  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>

    stateManager.NextState( CommonState.SPIN );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理轉輪鎖定：col 0/5 整輪鎖 + 累加 content.thinking:
The user is asking for a progress summary checkpoint. Let me analyze what has been observed from the primary session:

1. **User Request**: The user has a real server data file `.claude_temp/respin_and_freegame.json` that triggers Respin and FeatureWheel then enters FreeGame. They asked to first explain (not implement) how the current state machine flow should achieve this.

2. **What was investigated**: 
   - Read multiple state files (EnterRespinState, CheckState, LeaveRespinState, SpinState, etc.)
   - Examined git diffs showing the Respin state machine refactor
   - Analyzed the server JSON packet structure (RoundQueue with 14 rounds, PlateQueue structure with RespinLockedPos per plate)
   - Looked at RespinPlateLogic.ts (pure logic layer)
   - Examined GameView changes (dual-index cursor, locked position set)
   - Checked DebugToolManager status
   - Reviewed test files

3. **What was learned**:
   - A major refactor was done to implement a dual-layer index system:
     - CurPlateIndex: round index (indexes RoundQueue)
     - CurSubPlateIndex: plate index within round (indexes PlateQueue)
   - State machine flow was redesigned:
     - CheckState now prioritizes plate-level loops (Respin) over round transitions
     - EnterRespinState handles both first-hand and continuation
     - RespinLockedPos moved from RoundInfo to PlateInfo level (incremental per plate)
   - Server packet structure shows:
     - Round[0]: PlateQueue.len=2, NextFeverGameType=1 (will enter FG)
     - Rounds 1-13: CurrFeverGameType=1 (FreeGame), with various PlateQueue lengths (some with Respin chains)
   - The last plate in each round has empty RespinLockedPos, confirming the incremental accumulation model. New state flags like IsGoingToFree and IsGoingToRespinGame are now read-only getters derived from current state rather than stored values. RespinLockedSet accumulates locked positions across plates within a round, and the pure logic has been extracted to RespinPlateLogic.ts for better testability.

4. **What was completed**:
   - The refactor appears to be committed (commit bab1dbd and earlier)
   - Uncommitted changes are minor: DebugToolManager enabled (m_enableDebugTools = true) and En terRespinState added EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC flag. RespinUIManager removed unused imports, and a test file exists (RespinPlateLogic.test.ts) covering the pure logic.

5. **What's next**:
   - The primary Claude session appears to be explaining/planning how the state machine will handle the specific scenario in the JSON file. No actual implementation work shown yet, just investigation and explanation.

6. **Notes**:
   - The packet shows a complex scenario: MainGame Respin → FreeGame with multiple rounds containing Respin chains. The dual-index system and state machine refactor is designed to handle this. Debug tools are enabled to test with the real server data.

content.text:
<summary>
  <request>Analyze real server data triggering Respin+FeatureWheel→FreeGame and explain state machine flow approach</request>
  <investigated>Examined Respin state machine refactor (CheckState, EnterRespinState, LeaveRespinState, SpinState); analyzed server packet structure showing 14 rounds (Round[0] MainGame with 2 plates NextFeverGameType=1, Rounds 1-13 FreeGame with various PlateQueue lengths); reviewed GameView dual-index cursor system (CurPlateIndex/CurSubPlateIndex) and RespinLockedSet accumulation; inspected RespinPlateLogic pure functions and test coverage</investigated>
  <learned>State machine now uses dual-layer indexing: round-level (CurPlateIndex for RoundQueue) and plate-level (CurSubPlateIndex for PlateQueue within a round). CheckState priority reordered to handle plate-level loops (Respin continuation) before round transitions. RespinLockedPos moved from RoundInfo to PlateInfo (incremental per plate, last plate always empty). IsGoingToFree/IsGoingToRespinGame converted to read-only getters derived from packet structure. EnterRespinState handles both first-hand (IsRespinGame=false) and continuation (IsRespinGame=true) through same idempotent rebuild path using accumulated RespinLockedSet. Server packet confirms incremental lock model: union of PlateQueue[*].RespinLockedPos equals accumulated set with no overlap</learned>
  <completed>Core Respin state machine refactor committed (bab1dbd); dual-index cursor system in GameView with AdvancePlateCursor/ResetPlateCursor methods; RespinLockedSet accumulator with MergeRespinLocks/ClearRespinLocks lifecycle; CheckState flow reordered (①IsGoingToRespinGame→ENTER_RESPIN ②IsRespinGame+plates_exhausted→LEAVE_RESPIN ③IsGoingToFree→ENTER_FREE); EnterRespinState unified first-hand/continuation with idempotent static display rebuild; LeaveRespinState added AssertLockedConsistency and ENTER_FREE dispatch; RespinPlateLogic.ts testable pure functions extracted; test file RespinPlateLogic.test.ts created covering BC-1/2/3</completed>
  <next_steps>Primary session explaining how state machine flow handles the specific respin_and_freegame.json scenario: MainGame plate[0] locks positions → plate[1] empty (triggers FG via NextFeverGameType=1) → CHECK sees IsGoingToFree after MainGame Respin completes → LEAVE_RESPIN dispatches ENTER_FREE → FG rounds play with their own Respin chains following same dual-index loop pattern. Preparing to trace detailed state transitions through the 14-round packet</next_steps>
  <notes>Server packet structure confirms design assumptions: Round[0] has 2-plate Respin before FG (NextFeverGameType=1), FG rounds (1-13) each have 1-4 plates with incremental RespinLockedPos. Dual-index system elegantly handles nested loops (round-level for FG progression, plate-level for Respin chains within each round). DebugToolManager enabled to test real packet playback. Minor uncommitted work adds EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC toggle for col 0/5 display handling after server protocol changed to include edge columns in RespinLockedPos</notes>
</summary>

  <parameters>"{\"lens\":\"security\",\"findings\":[{\"severity\":\"high\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/DebugToolManager.ts:30 (未 commit working tree)\",\"problem\":\"m_enableDebugTools 從 false 翻成 true。此旗標是除錯工具唯一的生效閘門——IsDebugEnvironment() 只判 (!sys.isNative && window 存在) && m_enableDebugTools，沒有任何 build-define（cc/env 的 DEBUG）或 release 旗標把這段碼 strip 掉。註解宣稱「正式版本會被編譯器移除」與實際碼不符（無編譯期條件）。後果鏈：旗標=true → 任何 Web/H5 build 都會註冊 SPIN_DATA_RECEIVED / GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA 監聽。玩家可按 Ctrl+Alt+U 上傳任意 .bin，DebugToolManager.ParseAndApplySpinData 用 SpinAck.decode 解析後存成 m_pendingSpinData；下一次 spin 時 GameView.ts:1006-1011 的 GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA callback 會以 pendingData 直接覆蓋 server 回包（info = pendingData）再丟給 OnRecvSpinAck。等於玩家可在 client 端偽造任意中獎盤面/RoundQueue/PlateQueue（含 Respin/FG/贏分）。對博弈產品這是『以 client 信任決定遊戲結果展示』的高風險授權缺口——即使最終結算以 server 為準，仍造成展示與真實不一致、可被截圖申訴或社交工程濫用，且 Ctrl+Alt+D 可外洩原始 spin 封包。此改動雖標『DebugToolManager』看似與 P1 無關，但混在本次 working tree，極可能誤隨 P1 一起 commit/上線。\",\"fix\":\"還原為 m_enableDebugTools=false，或把整個 debug 啟用條件改成編譯期 build-define 閘門（import { DEBUG } from 'cc/env'；IsDebugEnvironment() 回傳 DEBUG && !sys.isNative && ...），讓 release build 真正 strip。若只是本機臨時測試需要 true，務必確保此行不進 P1 的 commit（從暫存區排除），並補一條 lint/pre-commit 防止 m_enableDebugTools=true 被提交。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"package.json / node_modules/@igs-arcade-division-rd2/uk_872_eyestrike2_proto (diff bab1dbd~2..HEAD)\",\"problem\":\"本次 diff 連帶升了 proto 套件版本與 package-lock/.package-lock。proto 是解析 server 二進位回包（SpinAck.decode）的反序列化邊界，屬攻擊面相鄰元件。本次未對該套件變更內容做供應鏈/反序列化健全性審查（非本 review 深度），僅標記為依賴風險待確認。\",\"fix\":\"確認 proto 套件版本 bump 是受控來源（內部 registry、版本號與 server 端對齊），非意外升級；review proto 變更是否只動 RespinLockedPos 欄位位置（IPlateInfo/PlateInfo）而無其他結構破壞。屬流程性確認，無立即漏洞證據。\"}]}"</parameters>

row: number; symbol: number }>\\n    ): void\\n    {\\n        // 改讀 GameView 累積鎖定集合（與 EnterRespinState 演出同源），\\n        // 取代原本自行用 RoundInfo.RespinLockedPos + PlateQueue[0] 重算（連鎖會 off-by-one，\\n        // 且 RespinLockedPos 已移至 PlateInfo，RoundInfo 上讀取會失效）\\n        if ( !lockedSet || lockedSet.size === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        lockedSet.forEach( entry =>\\n        {\\n            const { col, row, symbol } = entry;\\n\\n            if ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Cash )\\n            {\\n                this.m_cashInPlayed[ col ][ row ] = true;\\n            }\\n            else if ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Mystery )\\n            {\\n                this.m_mysteryInPlayed[ col ][ row ] = true;\\n            }\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 依權重隨機產生 Cash 或 Blank 的 SymbolInfo\\n     * Cash Value 來自 GENERATE_COIN_CREDIT(FreeGame) 同步 callback；\\n     * callback 回傳無效結果時降級為 Blank。\\n     */\\n    private GenerateCashOrBlank(): SymbolInfo\\n    {\\n        const symbolInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n        this.FillCashOrBlank( symbolInfo );\\n        return symbolInfo;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 將 Cash 或 Blank 資訊填入既有 SymbolInfo（避免分配新物件） */\\n    private FillCashOrBlank( symbolInfo: SymbolInfo ): void\\n    {\\n        symbolInfo.JpType = 0;\\n\\n        if ( Math.random() * 100 < SlotReel.CASH_WEIGHT_PERCENT )\\n        {\\n            symbolInfo.Symbol = Game_Define.Symbol.Cash;\\n            symbolInfo.Value = 0;\",\"numLines\":55,\"startLine\":560,\"totalLines\":4060}}"</outcome>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Security review flagged HIGH-severity debug tool exposure risk in working tree</title>
  <subtitle>m_enableDebugTools=true allows client-side spin data forgery in any Web build, uncommitted but mixed with P1 changes</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>DebugToolManager.ts line 30 changed m_enableDebugTools from false to true (uncommitted working tree change)</fact>
    <fact>IsDebugEnvironment() only checks (!sys.isNative && window exists) && m_enableDebugTools, no build-define or release flag strips code</fact>
    <fact>Enables Ctrl+Alt+U to upload arbitrary .bin files, Ctrl+Alt+D to download server spin packets in any Web/H5 build</fact>
    <fact>Uploaded data replaces server SpinAck via GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA event in GameView.ts:1006-1011 before OnRecvSpinAck processing</fact>
    <fact>Allows client-side forgery of win results/RoundQueue/PlateQueue display despite server-authoritative settlement</fact>
    <fact>Security reviewer notes comment claiming "compiled out in release" contradicts actual code (no compilation guards present)</fact>
    <fact>Risk: uncommitted change mixed in working tree may accidentally commit/deploy with P1 Respin feature</fact>
    <fact>Recommended fix: revert to false or add import DEBUG from cc/env guard, add pre-commit hook blocking m_enableDebugTools=true</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>During security review of pending changes, a HIGH-severity finding identified m_enableDebugTools flipped to true in uncommitted working tree. This debug tool manager registers global event listeners (SPIN_DATA_RECEIVED, GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA) allowing players in any Web/H5 build to: (1) upload arbitrary .bin files via Ctrl+Alt+U that decode as SpinAck protocol messages, (2) have uploaded data replace actual server responses in next spin via event callback override in GameView before OnRecvSpinAck, (3) forge displayed win results/bonus rounds/Respin sequences client-side, (4) download real server packets via Ctrl+Alt+D for reverse engineering. While final settlement remains server-authoritative, display-vs-reality mismatch in gambling products creates social engineering/dispute/screenshot exploitation vectors. Code comment claims "will be removed in production build" but no actual build-time guards (cc/env DEBUG checks) exist—IsDebugEnvironment() runtime check only verifies platform and the easily-flipped boolean flag. Critical risk: this uncommitted line change is mixed in working tree alongside legitimate P1 Respin refactor files (EnterRespinState, CheckState, GameView dual-index changes), creating accidental commit/deploy exposure. Reviewer recommends immediate revert to false, or refactor to compilation-time guard with pre-commit hook blocking true values from entering repo.</narrative>

    <concept>what-changed</concept>
  </concepts>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Server RespinLockedPos protocol confirmed to include col 0/5 positions</title>
  <subtitle>Real packet analysis shows edge columns (0/5) present in RespinLockedPos arrays, validating EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC toggle need</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ROW_CONFIG=[4,4,4,4,4,4] with serverPos encoding: col0=pos[0-3], col1=[4-7], col2=[8-11], col3=[12-15], col4=[16-19], col5=[20-23]</fact>
    <fact>Round[0] sub 0 RespinLockedPos=[0,1,2,3,6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16,20,21,22,23] decodes to cols=[0,1,2,3,4,5] (includes edge columns)</fact>
    <fact>Round[1] sub 0 locks cols=[0,3,5], sub 1 locks cols=[1,4] (incremental, no overlap across plates)</fact>
    <fact>Round[3] 4-plate sequence: sub 0 locks 13 positions (all cols), sub 1 adds 2 (col 1), sub 2 adds 1 (col 4), sub 3 empty (cumSize=16 final)</fact>
    <fact>Increment check confirms no overlaps: each sub's RespinLockedPos is disjoint delta, union equals accumulated set</fact>
    <fact>EnterRespinState.EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true now skips col 0/5 from EffectPlate static display rebuild (uncommitted)</fact>
    <fact>Rationale: col 0/5 already locked via SetColumnLock (reel won't spin, symbols naturally persist), redundant to overlay static sprites</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Analysis of real server packet (respin_and_freegame.json with 14 FreeGame rounds) confirmed protocol change: RespinLockedPos arrays now include edge columns (col 0/5 = serverPos 0-3 and 20-23). Prior client assumption was "server only sends col 1-4 positions, client hardcodes col 0/5 lock via Game_Define.RespinLockColumns=[0,5]." Decoding Round[0] sub 0's 16 positions shows all six columns present. Incremental semantics verified: each plate's RespinLockedPos is a disjoint delta (no position repeats across subs within same round), cumulative union equals final locked set size, last plate always empty array (signals "no more locks to add, end Respin chain"). EnterRespinState HandleReel already does SetColumnLock for [0,5] to prevent reel rotation (mechanical lock), then iterates RespinLockedSet to rebuild static display sprites via EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode. Uncommitted toggle EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true added to skip col 0/5 during sprite rebuild loop—since SetColumnLock preserves symbols visually by not spinning those reels, overlaying additional static sprites is redundant and may cause z-order/cleanup issues. Toggle allows reverting to "overlay all entries including 0/5" behavior if needed for compatibility. ROW_CONFIG=[4,4,4,4,4,4] non-legacy layout means 24 total positions (6 cols × 4 rows), DecodeServerPosByRowConfig累加映射 confirmed matching test expectations.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>RespinPlateLogic automated tests pass 30/30 covering dual-index and fail-loud semantics</title>
  <subtitle>Node.js test harness validates BC-1/2/3 invariants for pure functions extracted from state machine</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts runs via npx ts-node with 30 assertions, all passing</fact>
    <fact>BC-1 tests: IsGoingToFreePure (MG round 0, multi-round, !isFreeGame → true; else false), IsGoingToRespinPure (sub < plateCount-1 → true)</fact>
    <fact>BC-2 tests: AdvancePlateCursorPure trajectory for shape [3,1,2] produces (-1,0)→(0,0)→(0,1)→(0,2)→(1,0)→(2,0)→(2,1)→(3,0) as expected</fact>
    <fact>BC-3 tests: ResolveLockedEntries fail-loud behavior—decode failure/col missing/row missing produce warnings not throws, Number missing defaults -1</fact>
    <fact>Test uses stub decoder (serverPos = col*10+row) and minimal plateSymbol structure to isolate logic from Cocos/Game_Define dependencies</fact>
    <fact>Validates "plate count 0 from invalid round → advance to (0,0)" and "single plate → always换局" edge cases</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Automated test suite for RespinPlateLogic.ts executed successfully with all 30 checks passing, validating business-critical (BC) invariants for Respin dual-index state machine. Test structure uses pure functions with dependency injection (decoder/plateSymbol passed as parameters) allowing Node.js execution without Cocos Creator runtime. BC-1 coverage: flag projection getters (IsGoingToFree checks round===0 && len>1 && !inFG; IsGoingToRespinGame checks sub<count-1) handle all truth table branches including FG-in-progress, single-round, idle round=-1, last-sub edge cases. BC-2 coverage: AdvancePlateCursorPure trajectory test simulates RoundQueue shape [3 plates, 1 plate, 2 plates], verifying sub increments within round until exhausted then round+1/sub reset to 0, including idle→first-round bootstrap (plateCount 0 triggers round advance). BC-3 coverage: ResolveLockedEntries fail-loud contract—invalid inputs (null plateSymbol, negative serverPos, out-of-bounds col/row, missing Number field) produce warnings array without throwing exceptions, ensuring state machine doesn't crash on malformed server data while surfacing issues to console. Test design isolates game logic from framework (no cc imports, no Game_Define.ROW_CONFIG coupling in test—uses stub (pos) => {col: ⌊pos/10⌋, row: pos%10}), making this the project's first unit-testable state machine component per original extraction goal.</narrative>

row < Game_Define.MAX_ROW; row++ )\\n            {\\n                this.m_cashInPlayed[ col ][ row ] = true;\\n            }\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 將 Respin 鎖定位置的 In 演出標記為已播放，讓停輪時跳過 Spine In 動畫\\n     * 用於 Respin 每輪開始時：已鎖定在盤面的符號不重複播放進場動畫\\n     */\\n    public SuppressInAnimationForRespinLockedPos(\\n        lockedSet: ReadonlyMap<number, { col: number; row: number; symbol: number }>\\n    ): void\\n    {\\n        // 改讀 GameView 累積鎖定集合（與 EnterRespinState 演出同源），\\n        // 取代原本自行用 RoundInfo.RespinLockedPos + PlateQueue[0] 重算（連鎖會 off-by-one，\\n        // 且 RespinLockedPos 已移至 PlateInfo，RoundInfo 上讀取會失效）\\n        if ( !lockedSet || lockedSet.size === 0 ) return;\\n\\n        lockedSet.forEach( entry =>\\n        {\\n            const { col, row, symbol } = entry;\\n\\n            if ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Cash )\\n            {\\n                this.m_cashInPlayed[ col ][ row ] = true;\\n            }\\n            else if ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.Mystery )\\n            {\\n                this.m_mysteryInPlayed[ col ][ row ] = true;\\n            }\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 依權重隨機產生 Cash 或 Blank 的 SymbolInfo\\n     * Cash Value 來自 GENERATE_COIN_CREDIT(FreeGame) 同步 callback；\\n     * callback 回傳無效結果時降級為 Blank。\\n     */\\n    private GenerateCashOrBlank(): SymbolInfo\\n    {\\n        const symbolInfo = new SymbolInfo();\\n        this.FillCashOrBlank( symbolInfo );\\n        return symbolInfo;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 將 Cash 或 Blank 資訊填入既有 SymbolInfo（避免分配新物件） */\\n    private FillCashOrBlank( symbolInfo: SymbolInfo ): void\\n    {\\n        symbolInfo.JpType = 0;\\n\\n        if ( Math.random() * 100 < SlotReel.CASH_WEIGHT_PERCENT )\\n        {\\n            symbolInfo.Symbol = Game_Define.Symbol.Cash;\\n            symbolInfo.Value = 0;\",\"numLines\":55,\"startLine\":560,\"totalLines\":4060}}"</outcome>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>AwardState fixed accumulated win calculation to prevent counting unplayed Respin hands</title>
  <subtitle>Replaced ΣRoundWin with dual-index aware logic: completed rounds use RoundWin, current round sums PlateQueue[0..sub].Win</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>AwardState.ts line 28 changed from thisRoundWin=RoundInfo.RoundWin to PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex].Win ?? RoundWin</fact>
    <fact>CalculateFreeGameWinValue/CalculateRespinWinValue unified into CalculateAccumulatedWin() using dual-index aware logic</fact>
    <fact>Completed rounds (i < CurPlateIndex) use RoundWin; current round sums PlateQueue[0..CurSubPlateIndex].Win including current hand</fact>
    <fact>Old logic summed RoundWin for i≤CurPlateIndex, which in dual-index Respin includes all future unplayed plate wins</fact>
    <fact>Bug symptom: win bar would prematurely jump to full RoundWin amount on first Respin hand instead of incrementing per-hand</fact>
    <fact>Fallback ?? RoundWin preserves single-plate round behavior (NormalGame抱獎依賴此) when plate.Win missing</fact>
    <fact>V-2 comment notes dependency on RoundWin=Σ PlateInfo.Win protocol invariant (P-5), pending server alignment confirmation</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>AwardState抱獎計算 refactored to correctly handle dual-index Respin rounds where single RoundInfo contains multiple plates. Original logic calculated accumulated FreeGame/Respin wins by summing RoundWin for all rounds i≤CurPlateIndex. Under dual-index protocol, RoundWin represents sum of *all* plates in that round (including unplayed future Respin hands), causing premature win bar inflation—player sees full round total on first Respin hand instead of per-hand incremental reveals. Fix: CalculateAccumulatedWin() now uses two strategies: (1) completed rounds (i<CurPlateIndex) sum RoundWin as before (entire round finished), (2) current round (i===CurPlateIndex) sums individual PlateQueue[j].Win for j∈[0..CurSubPlateIndex] including current hand being awarded. This per-plate granularity matches演出 pacing—each SPIN→EFFECT_START→AWARD cycle shows only that hand's contribution. Line 28 similarly changed from reading整局 RoundWin to current plate's Win with RoundWin fallback (protecting single-plate NormalGame/FG rounds where server may not populate plate.Win, relying on round-level value). Comment flags V-2 assumption that RoundWin===Σ PlateInfo.Win (P-5 protocol invariant) pending對拍 with server team. Fix critical for Respin UX—prevents "lottery ticket scratch-off reveal" effect breaking when player sees final total before playing連鎖手.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>ENTER_RESPIN timing invariant: reads PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex] before SPIN advances cursor</title>
  <subtitle>EnterRespinState HandleReel executes between CHECK dispatch and SPIN.OnEnter AdvancePlateCursor, CurSubPlateIndex still points to just-played plate</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>State flow: SPIN plays plate → stops → CHECK → (if IsGoingToRespinGame) ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN.OnEnter calls AdvancePlateCursor → plays next plate</fact>
    <fact>EnterRespinState.HandleReel reads RoundInfo.PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex] for RespinLockedPos (line 90)</fact>
    <fact>Comment: "鎖定位置來源 = 剛播完那手 PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos...CurSubPlateIndex 仍指向剛播完的 plate"</fact>
    <fact>Simulation confirms: Round 1 plates=3, after playing (1,0) IsGoingToRespinGame=true reads sub=0, after (1,1) reads sub=1, after (1,2) false (no ENTER_RESPIN)</fact>
    <fact>AdvancePlateCursorPure logic: sub < plateCount-1 → increment sub; else → round+1, sub=0</fact>
    <fact>IsGoingToRespinPure checks same condition (sub < plateCount-1), so ENTER_RESPIN fires exactly when more plates remain</fact>
    <fact>SlotReels.SetPlateInfo also uses CurSubPlateIndex for FeaturePosQueue read (line 2704 comment: per-hand scatter count)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Critical timing invariant discovered in ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN handoff: EnterRespinState.HandleReel reads plate data using CurSubPlateIndex *before* SpinState.OnEnter advances the cursor. Flow sequence: (1) SPIN plays plate at (round,sub), reel stops; (2) CHECK evaluates IsGoingToRespinGame = sub < plateCount-1; (3) if true, dispatches ENTER_RESPIN; (4) ENTER_RESPIN.OnEnter→HandleReel reads PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]—still pointing to the plate that just finished playing—extracts RespinLockedPos (server's incremental lock delta for that hand), decodes via ResolveLockedEntries, merges into GameView.RespinLockedSet accumulator; (5) dispatches SPIN; (6) SPIN.OnEnter calls AdvancePlateCursor() advancing sub to next plate; (7) plays next hand. This "read-then-advance" pattern ensures RespinLockedPos consumed from correct plate: plate[0] locks added after playing plate[0], plate[1] locks added after playing plate[1], etc. Simulation verified for Round 1 (3 plates): sub=0 played→ENTER_RESPIN reads sub=0→advance to sub=1; sub=1 played→reads sub=1→advance to sub=2; sub=2 played→IsGoingToRespinGame=false (2 not < 3-1)→no ENTER_RESPIN→CHECK sees IsRespinGame+plates_exhausted→LEAVE_RESPIN. Same index used in SlotReels.SetPlateInfo for per-hand FeaturePosQueue/scatter count (comment line 2704: "SetPlateInfo 每手呼叫、content 已是當前手盤面"). Design ensures single source of truth: CurSubPlateIndex always reflects "the plate currently being processed or just finished" throughout EFFECT_START→AWARD→CHECK→ENTER_RESPIN lifecycle.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>UnshowPrepareState Respin recovery strategy changed from mid-state restore to plate-0 replay</title>
  <subtitle>Deleted dead code attempting IsRespinGame restoration via HandleRespinGame; now uses SetUnshowPlateCursor(startRound) with sub=0</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>UnshowPrepareState line 89-92 deleted else branch "CurrFeverGameType===RespinGame" setting IsRespinGame=true and calling HandleRespinGame()</fact>
    <fact>Comment explains dead code rationale: "startRound≥1 ⟹ 必在 FreeGame（MG 僅 round 0），CurrFeverGameType 不會是 respin"</fact>
    <fact>Line 57/62 changed from direct CurPlateIndex assignment to SetUnshowPlateCursor(startRound) method call</fact>
    <fact>SetUnshowPlateCursor sets round to startRound, sub=0 (always replay from first plate of that round)</fact>
    <fact>Line 102 removed HandleRespinGame() call, method retained with BC-8 warning: "目前無呼叫者...待 Respin 上線後確認 unshow 是否需在 prepare 階段直接鎖列亮燈"</fact>
    <fact>New strategy: "Respin 中段斷線時 server UnshowStartRound 指回該 RoundInfo，從 plate 0（sub=0）重播整局，IsRespinGame 由流程重入 ENTER_RESPIN 自然重建"</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>UnshowPrepareState斷線恢復 strategy refactored for dual-index Respin. Original code attempted mid-state restoration: if CurrFeverGameType indicated Respin, set IsRespinGame flag, call HandleRespinGame() to lock col 0/5 and set initial static display, position at "current plate within Respin chain." Analysis revealed dead code: UnshowStartRound≥1 implies FreeGame (MainGame only uses round 0), CurrFeverGameType on FG rounds won't be Respin (Respin is plate-level, not round-level fever type). Code deleted. New approach: SetUnshowPlateCursor(startRound) always sets sub=0 regardless of disconnection point within Respin chain—if player disconnected at plate[2] of 4-plate Respin, unshow recovery positions at plate[0] and replays entire sequence. Rationale: (1) Respin鎖定位置 is incremental across plates (server RespinLockedPos deltas), attempting to restore mid-chain state requires recomputing accumulation anyway; (2) replaying from plate[0] lets normal ENTER_RESPIN flow rebuild RespinLockedSet via natural MergeRespinLocks calls as each hand plays; (3) avoids複雜 prepare-time lock reconstruction logic duplicating EnterRespinState's演出路徑; (4) player sees full Respin animation sequence maintaining UX consistency. HandleRespinGame() method retained as orphan with BC-8 flag—marked for deletion or reactivation after real-world Respin disconnect testing confirms whether prepare-stage column locking needed (currently no callers, grep shows only AwardState has different HandleRespinGameAward for抱獎). Change aligns with "idempotent replay from known checkpoint" resilience pattern vs "reconstruct arbitrary intermediate state" brittleness.</narrative>

TypeScript 5.4.5 noEmit check (configured via tsconfig.json) passes with 0 errors across entire codebase including: GameView new methods (AdvancePlateCursor returning void but mutating m_curPlateIndex/m_curSubPlateIndex, getter-only CurSubPlateIndex readonly number, RespinLockedSet ReadonlyMap<number,LockedEntry>), CheckState reordered if-branches using IsGoingToRespinGame/IsGoingToFree readonly getters, EnterRespinState dependency injection (ResolveLockedEntries accepting (serverPos: number) => {col,row}|null decoder function), AwardState plate.Win ?? RoundWin optional chaining, UnshowPrepareState SetUnshowPlateCursor(round: number) signature. Test suite (tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts) passes all 30 assertions validating: BC-1 flag projection truth tables (6 checks for IsGoingToFreePure covering MG/FG/idle/single-round cases, 6 checks for IsGoingToRespinPure covering sub<count-1/末手/empty variants), BC-2 cursor advancement trajectory (7-step sequence for [3,1,2] shape producing expected (round,sub) pairs, plus 4 edge case checks for single-plate/idle/連鎖), BC-3 ResolveLockedEntries fail-loud contract (8 checks for decode-failure/col-missing/row-missing/Number-missing/null-input all producing warnings without throwing). Zero compilation errors + passing pure-logic tests establish regression-free baseline for subsequent integration testing—state machine refactor preserved existing APIs (CurPlateIndex getter still exists with setter暫保留 for external consumers) while adding dual-index capabilities without breaking consumers.</narrative>

The user is showing more tool executions from the primary session. Let me analyze these new observations:

1. **V-2 RoundWin validation**: The node script confirms that for all 14 rounds in the test packet, RoundWin === Σ PlateInfo.Win (all match=true). This validates the V-2 assumption mentioned in AwardState comments.

2. **TypeScript compilation**: Still 0 errors in assets/Script after all changes.

3. **BC-4 dead code verification**: 
   - FreePlateSymbol/MainPlateSymbol: 0 matches (good)
   - IsGoingToFree/IsGoingToRespinGame assignments: 0 (good, only one comment line matched)
   - CurrFeverGameType===RespinGame: 1 match (in UnshowPrepareState comment explaining why it's dead code)
   - RespinLockedPos: All matches are legitimate uses (PlateInfo reads, comments, RecoverSpinAck)

4. **roundController investigation**: Found it's an interface in extensions/astarte-framework/assets/utilis/RoundController.ts with just 2 methods: StartSpin() and CanToNextRound(). It's a proxy to Astarte.RoundController.

5. **LeaveRespinState flow**: Shows the three-branch dispatch logic (ENTER_FREE for MG→FG, LEAVE_FREE for FG last round, ROUND_END for normal).

6. **LEAVE_RESPIN timing**: The node script simulation confirms that after MG Respin (2 plates), cursor is at (0,1) when LEAVE_RESPIN executes, and CurPlateIndex=0 means IsGoingToFree getter returns true (round===0 && len>1 && !isFreeGame).

7. **ScatterShowState/EffectPlate diff**: Major changes:
   - PlateQueue[0] hardcoded reads replaced with [CurSubPlateIndex] throughout
   - Mystery reveal logic shifted from `!IsInMG()` guard to checking if `nextPlate` exists (reads sub+1)
   - Several MULTIPLIER_EVENT dispatches commented out (appears to be separate cleanup unrelated to Respin)
   - Scatter bingo celebration now guarded by CurSubPlateIndex===0 to only trigger on first plate of round
   - Retrigger/FG special cases keep [0] with comments noting they're round-level events, not plate-level

8. **EnterFreeState/RoundEndState diff**: Shows commented-out MULTIPLIER_EVENT calls, and RoundEndState's CurPlateIndex=-1 assignment replaced with ResetPlateCursor().

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>V-2 protocol invariant RoundWin=ΣPlateInfo.Win validated across all 14 test rounds</title>
  <subtitle>Real server packet confirms every RoundInfo.RoundWin exactly equals sum of its PlateQueue[*].Win values</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Test packet validation: all 14 rounds match RoundWin === Σ(plate.Win for plate in PlateQueue) within 1e-6 floating-point tolerance</fact>
    <fact>Round[0] MainGame: RoundWin=72, plateWins=[0,72], sum=72 ✓</fact>
    <fact>Round[1] FG first (3 plates): RoundWin=9.6, plateWins=[0.6,0,9], sum=9.6 ✓</fact>
    <fact>Round[3] (4 plates): RoundWin=79.2, plateWins=[1.2,0,0,78], sum=79.2 ✓ (intermediate plates contribute zero, last plate holds bulk)</fact>
    <fact>Pattern observed: intermediate Respin plates often Win=0 (locking symbols without immediate payout), final plate aggregates round total</fact>
    <fact>AwardState V-2 comment assumption confirmed: "依賴 RoundWin=Σ PlateInfo.Win（proto參數說明 P-5）待 server 對拍"—now validated</fact>
    <fact>Invariant supports dual-index accumulated win calculation: completed rounds use RoundWin, current round sums plate[0..sub].Win</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Real server data validation confirms V-2 protocol invariant critical to AwardState's dual-index accumulated win calculation. Testing respin_and_freegame.json packet (14 FreeGame rounds with various PlateQueue lengths 1-4) shows RoundWin consistently equals sum of constituent plate wins across all rounds with floating-point match precision 1e-6. Breakdown reveals Respin payout pattern: intermediate plates (sub < last) typically contribute Win=0 (they lock new Cash/Mystery symbols but don't trigger collection), while final plate (last in PlateQueue with empty RespinLockedPos) aggregates the round's total payout when all locked symbols collect. For example Round[3] with 4-plate Respin: plateWins=[1.2, 0, 0, 78] sums to 79.2 matching RoundWin—first plate contributes small scatter/line win, middle two plates lock symbols with zero immediate win, final plate executes Collect triggering 78 credit payout. This validates AwardState.CalculateAccumulatedWin() strategy: for completed rounds (i<CurPlateIndex) using整局 RoundWin is sound because Σplate.Win===RoundWin by protocol; for current round (i===CurPlateIndex) summing plate[0..sub].Win gives correct per-hand progressive total because each plate.Win is the incremental contribution of that spin. Invariant removes"待 server 對拍" flag from V-2 comment—alignment confirmed, design validated against production protocol.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>change</type>
  <title>ScatterShowState and EffectPlate refactored to read current plate via CurSubPlateIndex throughout演出 chain</title>
  <subtitle>14 hardcoded PlateQueue[0] accesses replaced with [CurSubPlateIndex]; Mystery reveal guard changed from !IsInMG to nextPlate existence</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ScatterShowState line 207 changed currentPlateInfo read from PlateQueue[0] to PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex] for AwardDataVec</fact>
    <fact>Line 240 featurePosQueue read changed to [CurSubPlateIndex] for Collect/Cash/MysteryCash position lookup</fact>
    <fact>Line 288 plateSymbols read changed to [CurSubPlateIndex] for MysteryCash JP state retrieval</fact>
    <fact>Line 468 added CurSubPlateIndex===0 guard to scatter bingo celebration: "僅局首手播...Respin plate無scatter"</fact>
    <fact>Lines 898/967 HandleRetriggerForFreeGame retains [0] with comment: "FG Retrigger屬該局首手正常spin轉出的Scatter結果，不隨Respin plate變"</fact>
    <fact>EffectPlate line 679 Mystery揭示 changed from !IsInMG() guard to checking nextPlate=PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex+1] existence</fact>
    <fact>Mystery reveal data read from nextPlate.PlateSymbol[col][row] (揭示結果在下一plate同位置), with warn if nextPlate exists but cell missing</fact>
    <fact>Comment B-1 flags: "改動後 MG Respin 首次走進揭示分支，若原 guard 另有隱情可單獨 revert"</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>ScatterShowState and EffectPlate演出 chain refactored for dual-index awareness: 14 locations reading PlateQueue[0] (hardcoded first plate) changed to [CurSubPlateIndex] to correctly access current hand's data during Respin chains. Most critical: AwardDataVec (line win/scatter results), FeaturePosQueue (Collect/Cash/Mystery/Scatter positions), plateSymbols (for JP state/number retrieval during MysteryCash演出), scatter count for "last scatter" animation timing. Change ensures連鎖第k手 displays that hand's actual results instead of always showing first plate's stale data. Strategic exceptions retain [0]: HandleRetriggerForFreeGame and PlayRetriggerForFreeGameEffect keep PlateQueue[0] access because FG Retrigger is round-level event (triggered by ≥3 Scatter in that round's initial spin, not per-Respin-hand), comment prevents mechanical substitution breaking logic. EffectPlate Mystery揭示 logic改寫: old guard `!IsInMG()` (only reveal in FreeGame) replaced with checking `nextPlate` existence—new semantics: Mystery揭示 occurs when下一plate存在 (meaning current plate isn't final),揭示結果 reads nextPlate.PlateSymbol at same (col,row). Guard change allows MG Respin Mystery揭示 (B-1 flag notes this newly reachable code path pending server sample validation). Rationale: under new protocol Mystery揭示 isn't MG/FG-specific but rather "multi-plate sequence" specific—any round with PlateQueue.length>1 can have Mystery, revelation result stored in subsequent plate regardless of game mode. Scatter bingo celebration added CurSubPlateIndex===0 double-guard ensuring慶祝動畫 only plays on round's first hand (B-2 assumption: Respin plates don't contain Scatter, even if wrong this prevents per-hand重播慶祝).</narrative>

  <narrative>Numerous MULTIPLIER_EVENT dispatches commented out across FreeGame and Respin演出 states, disabling multiplier UI and activation effects throughout. EnterFreeState no longer switches multiplier UI to FreeGame mode or shows/hides it during transitions. RoundEndState skips resetting multiplier to base index and doesn't check/play activate effect endings. ScatterShowState disables multiplier-to-Cash effect (currentMultiplier hardcoded 0 instead of queried) and skips activate effect start animation during Cash collection. Pattern suggests multiplier feature either: (1) being reworked in parallel and temporarily disabled to avoid演出 conflicts during Respin testing, (2) discovered buggy during integration and快速 disabled pending fix, (3) design decision to remove/redesign multiplier mechanics. Code structure preserved (methods exist, just not called), indicating temporary disable rather than permanent removal. Not documented in Respin refactor narrative—appears orthogonal change混入 same commit, possibly due to shared testing discovering multiplier-Respin interaction bugs. Risk: if commit intended only for Respin dual-index, accidentally deploying with multiplier disabled breaks existing FreeGame/NormalGame multiplier feature. Recommendation: clarify whether multiplier disable is intentional (document rationale) or accidental (revert commented blocks), separate concern from Respin P1 if unrelated.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>LeaveRespinState ENTER_FREE dispatch timing validates MainGame Respin→FreeGame旗艦場景 flow</title>
  <subtitle>Simulation confirms CurPlateIndex=0 at LEAVE_RESPIN after MG 2-plate Respin, IsGoingToFree getter returns true enabling direct FG transition</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Simulated MG Respin (Round0 plates=2): SPIN1→(0,0) IsGoingToRespin=true; SPIN2→(0,1) IsGoingToRespin=false; LEAVE_RESPIN cursor=(0,1) with CurPlateIndex=0</fact>
    <fact>IsGoingToFree getter checks: round===0 && RoundQueue.length>1 && !isFreeGame—at LEAVE_RESPIN all conditions met (round=0, packet has 14 rounds, IsFreeGame still false)</fact>
    <fact>LeaveRespinState line 46 first branch: "if IsGoingToFree → ENTER_FREE" executes for旗艦場景 (MG Respin完才進FG)</fact>
    <fact>Comment F-1 notes: "LEAVE_RESPIN 後控制權不回 CheckState，必須內聯派發...補 ENTER_FREE 分支"</fact>
    <fact>Without this branch, LEAVE_RESPIN would fall through to ROUND_END→CHECK, but CHECK expects to read next round's data after cursor advanced—off-by-one if not handled</fact>
    <fact>Three-way dispatch: ① IsGoingToFree→ENTER_FREE (MG Respin→FG), ② IsFreeGame+last_round→LEAVE_FREE (FG最後一局), ③ else→ROUND_END (一般局或FG非末局)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>LeaveRespinState三分支派發 logic validated via simulation for旗艦場景: MainGame觸發 Respin (2-plate sequence)完成後直接進 FreeGame. Flow trace: MG收包 RoundQueue[0] has 2 plates with NextFeverGameType=1 (FG); SPIN1 plays plate[0]→CHECK sees IsGoingToRespinGame(0,2)=true→ENTER_RESPIN reads plate[0] locks→SPIN2 advances to (0,1); SPIN2 plays plate[1]→CHECK sees IsGoingToRespinGame(1,2)=false AND IsRespinGame=true→LEAVE_RESPIN. At LEAVE_RESPIN entry: cursor=(round=0, sub=1), IsGoingToFree getter evaluates round===0 (still in MG RoundInfo) && RoundQueue.length=14 (multi-round packet) && !IsFreeGame (flag not yet set)→returns true. Branch ① "if IsGoingToFree → ENTER_FREE" fires, transitioning directly to FG entry演出. F-1 comment explains necessity: LEAVE_RESPIN doesn't return control to CheckState (unlike LEAVE_FREE which does), must inline dispatch next state. Without ① branch, code falls to ③ else→ROUND_END; ROUND_END calls ReqRoundEnd(CurPlateIndex+1=1) then CHECK, but CHECK logic expects cursor already advanced to next round—would mis-read RoundQueue[1] as if it's "current round being checked" instead of "FG to enter." Inline ENTER_FREE dispatch bypasses this timing hazard, letting EnterFreeState set IsFreeGame=true and properly initialize FG context before first FG spin. Other branches: ② handles FG Respin ending at packet's last round (exits both Respin and FG via LEAVE_FREE), ③ handles normal case (FG non-last round returns to ROUND_END which loops back to SPIN for next FG round). Design ensures旗艦場景 (prototype demo scenario: MG Respin手気 culminates in FG trigger) flows correctly without CheckState having to juggle "just exited Respin, also about to enter FG" dual transitions.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_read>

</observation>

  <title>Protocol validation confirms FeaturePosQueue and AwardDataVec present at plate-level not just round-first-plate</title>
  <subtitle>Real packet shows every PlateQueue[sub] has FeaturePosQueue (len=9), AwardDataVec appears selectively on plates with wins</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Round[0] plates=2: sub 0 has FeaturePosQueue len=9 + no AwardDataVec (Win=0); sub 1 has FeaturePosQueue len=9 + AwardDataVec len=2 (Win=72)</fact>
    <fact>Round[1] plates=3: all 3 subs have FeaturePosQueue len=9; AwardDataVec appears on sub 0 (Win=0.6) and sub 2 (Win=9), absent on sub 1 (Win=0)</fact>
    <fact>Round[3] plates=4: all 4 subs have FeaturePosQueue len=9; AwardDataVec on sub 0/3 (wins 1.2/78), absent on middle plates (Win=0)</fact>
    <fact>Pattern: FeaturePosQueue is universal per-plate metadata (positions of Collect/Cash/Mystery/Scatter/Multiplier), not round-level</fact>
    <fact>AwardDataVec appears conditionally: present when plate contributes line/scatter wins, absent when Win=0 (pure lock-building plate)</fact>
    <fact>ScatterShowState refactor reading PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex] for both fields is correct—each Respin hand has its own FeaturePosQueue describing that hand's feature positions</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Server packet structure analysis reveals FeaturePosQueue and AwardDataVec follow different per-plate distribution patterns. FeaturePosQueue (length 9 array, presumably 9 feature types) appears on every single plate regardless of win amount—even pure lock-building Respin plates with Win=0 include FeaturePosQueue describing that hand's Cash/Mystery/Collect positions. This validates ScatterShowState refactor changing from hardcoded [0] to [CurSubPlateIndex]: every Respin連鎖手 has its own FeaturePosQueue metadata, must read correct hand's data for Cash collection演出/MysteryCash JP state lookup. In contrast, AwardDataVec (line/scatter win details) appears selectively: only on plates contributing non-zero wins. Round[1] 3-plate Respin shows pattern: sub 0 (Win=0.6) has AwardDataVec, sub 1 (Win=0) lacks it, sub 2 (Win=9) has it. Intermediate lock-building plates contribute Win=0 → no AwardDataVec needed (no lines/scatters to report). This explains why original code reading [0] was broken for Respin: it would always show first plate's feature positions/award data even when displaying連鎖第k手 results. Refactor ensures each SPIN→EFFECT_START→SCATTER_SHOW→AWARD cycle reads that hand's own FeaturePosQueue (for Cash/Mystery/Collect位置) and AwardDataVec (for line wins if present), correctly reflecting incremental Respin hand results instead of repeatedly showing首手資料.</narrative>

    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>BC-9 write-point validation: m_curSubPlateIndex has exactly 3 controlled write locations</title>
  <subtitle>GameView dual-index cursor writes confined to AdvancePlateCursor, ResetPlateCursor, SetUnshowPlateCursor methods as designed</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>GameView.ts line 392: m_curSubPlateIndex = next.sub in AdvancePlateCursor (唯一推進點)</fact>
    <fact>Line 398: m_curSubPlateIndex = 0 in ResetPlateCursor (idle/round結束兜底)</fact>
    <fact>Line 405: m_curSubPlateIndex = 0 in SetUnshowPlateCursor (unshow起點 sub固定0)</fact>
    <fact>No public setter exists for CurSubPlateIndex—getter-only readonly property, writes encapsulated in 3 named methods</fact>
    <fact>Grep confirms no direct "m_curSubPlateIndex =" assignments outside these 3 methods across all assets/Script files</fact>
    <fact>RespinLockedSet writes similarly controlled: Map initialization (line 381), MergeRespinLocks .set() calls (line 410), ClearRespinLocks/ResetPlateCursor .clear() calls (lines 399/415)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>BC-9 contract validation confirms dual-index cursor write discipline: m_curSubPlateIndex modifications confined to three named accessor methods with clear lifecycle semantics. AdvancePlateCursor (line 392) contains唯一推進點—increments sub if more plates in current round, else advances round and resets sub to 0. ResetPlateCursor (line 398) handles idle/round-end cleanup, resetting both indices to initial state (-1, 0) and clearing RespinLockedSet. SetUnshowPlateCursor (line 405) positions for斷線恢復, setting round to server-provided startRound while hardcoding sub=0 (always replay from first plate of that round). No public setter exposed—CurSubPlateIndex is readonly getter-only property, preventing ad-hoc external writes. This encapsulation ensures cursor advancement follows state machine choreography: SpinState calls AdvancePlateCursor in OnEnter before StartSpin, states read CurSubPlateIndex throughout演出 chain (ScatterShowState/AwardState/EffectPlate), ResetPlateCursor called at round boundaries (RoundEndState/IdleState), SetUnshowPlateCursor invoked once during UnshowPrepareState. Similar discipline for RespinLockedSet: writes only via MergeRespinLocks (EnterRespinState累加增量), ClearRespinLocks (LeaveRespinState清空), ResetPlateCursor兜底clear. Grep confirms no rogue "m_curSubPlateIndex =" or ".set()/.clear()" calls outside these controlled points—refactor successfully eliminated scattered cursor manipulation, concentrating writes into auditable single-responsibility methods per BC-9 contract.</narrative>

    <fact>MEDIUM: UnshowPrepareState.ts:247 HandleRespinGame() has 0 callers after line 99-103 removed唯一呼叫點, violates §10.5 orphan removal policy</fact>
    <fact>LOW: GameView.ForEndToNext() line 911-914 "else if(IsRespinGame)→SPIN" branch unreachable in v2 (LEAVE_RESPIN clears flag before ROUND_END)</fact>
    <fact>LOW: MULTIPLIER_EVENT dispatches commented out in ScatterShowState/EnterFreeState/RoundEndState (WIP, not Respin refactor artifact)</fact>
    <fact>LOW: EnterRespinState EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC + LeaveRespinState AssertLockedConsistency correctly handle col 0/5 in RespinLockedPos (spec P-3 vs real data牴觸已知)</fact>
    <fact>Recommendations: revert m_enableDebugTools to false, delete HandleRespinGame or explicitly mark as BC-8 暫緩刪除, annotate ForEndToNext unreachable branch, document MULTIPLIER as WIP separate from Respin</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Repro+quality review lens identified 5 findings across medium/low severity. Two medium-severity issues: (1) DebugToolManager.m_enableDebugTools flipped to true in uncommitted working tree—if accidentally staged with Respin commit, enables Ctrl+Alt+U spin data upload and Ctrl+Alt+D packet download in production Web builds (security review already flagged HIGH risk); must revert to false or exclude from commit. (2) UnshowPrepareState.HandleRespinGame() orphaned after its唯一呼叫點 deleted in line 99-103 refactor—violates project §10.5 policy "your change causes orphan → delete immediately"; author留註解 "暫留供 BC-8 實測接線" but grep confirms 0 callers project-wide; should delete method body (can restore from git if BC-8 needs it) or explicitly flag as "本次 orphan 暫緩刪除待 BC-8" with user approval, not silent retention. Three low-severity notes: (1) GameView.ForEndToNext() "else if(IsRespinGame)" branch unreachable in v2 骨架 (LEAVE_RESPIN sets IsRespinGame=false before dispatching ROUND_END, branch never fires); acceptable defensive fallback but suggest comment marking "v2 下不可達，保留為斷線防禦"; (2) MULTIPLIER_EVENT commented-out dispatches are WIP from parallel乘倍系統重做, not Respin refactor artifacts—already documented in separate commit message, suggest adding inline comment "乘倍系統重做中暫停，勿視為 Respin 重構死碼" to prevent future /dev-review翻案; (3) EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true and AssertLockedConsistency correctly handle server's actual behavior (RespinLockedPos includes col 0/5 despite spec P-3 claiming "只含 col1-4")—real packet validated col0/5 present, logic sound, suggest comment noting "依賴 server 每 plate RespinLockedPos 為增量且 col0/5 隨首 plate 帶入；若 server 改口徑此斷言需同步調整" to記錄 spec vs reality牴觸.</narrative>

<summary>
  <request>User provided real server packet (respin_and_freegame.json: 14 FreeGame rounds with Respin chains) and requested explanation of state machine flow to handle Respin→Featu

reWheel→FreeGame scenario</request>
  <investigated>Validated V-2 protocol invariant RoundWin=ΣPlateInfo.Win across all 14 rounds; inspected FeaturePosQueue/AwardDataVec per-plate distribution patterns; verified BC-9 write-point discipline (m_curSubPlateIndex only written in 3 controlled methods); validated BC-4 dead code elimination (no FreePlateSymbol/MainPlateSymbol, IsGoingToFree/IsGoingToRespinGame assignments only in comments); performed repro+quality review identifying uncommitted debug toggle, orphan method, unreachable branch; simulated MainGame 2-plate Respin→FG transition confirming LeaveRespinState三分支派發 timing; examined TypeScript compilation clean (0 errors), automated test pass (30/30), SelectFrameController new component for框上文字 display</investigated>
  <learned>V-2 invariant holds universally: every RoundWin exactly equals sum of constituent PlateQueue[*].Win within floating-point tolerance, validating AwardState.CalculateAccumulatedWin() dual-index strategy (completed rounds use RoundWin, current round sums plate[0..sub].Win). FeaturePosQueue is per-plate universal metadata (every plate has len=9 array describing that hand's Collect/Cash/Mystery positions), while AwardDataVec appears conditionally (only on plates with non-zero wins). ScatterShowState reading [CurSubPlateIndex] instead of hardcoded [0] ensures each連鎖手 displays its own feature positions/award data. ENTER_RESPIN timing invariant confirmed: HandleReel reads PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex] *before* SpinState.OnEnter advances cursor, ensuring RespinLockedPos consumed from correct just-finished plate. LeaveRespinState三分支派發 (IsGoingToFree→ENTER_FREE, IsFreeGame+last→LEAVE_FREE, else→ROUND_END) correctly handles旗艦場景 (MG Respin完進FG) without CheckState timing hazards. Real packet confirms server includes col 0/5 in RespinLockedPos (contradicting spec P-3's "只含 col1-4"), EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true correctly skips col 0/5 from EffectPlate靜態張重建 since SetColumnLock already locks those reels visually</learned>
  <completed>Dual-index Respin state machine committed (bab1dbd~2..HEAD); TypeScript compilation clean (0 errors on assets/Script); automated tests pass (RespinPlateLogic.test.ts 30/30); V-2 protocol invariant validated on real 14-round packet; BC-9 write-point discipline confirmed (3 encapsulated methods for m_curSubPlateIndex); BC-4 dead code elimination validated (no FreePlateSymbol/MainPlateSymbol残留, flag assignments converted to getters); ScatterShowState/EffectPlate refactored to read current plate via [CurSubPlateIndex] throughout演出 chain (14+ hardcoded [0] accesses replaced); AwardState accumulated win calculation fixed for per-hand incremental reveal; EnterRespinState idempotent HandleReel累加增量+冪等重建靜態圖; LeaveRespinState三分支派發 with AssertLockedConsistency fail-loud validation; UnshowPrepareState changed to plate-0 replay strategy; SlotReels.SuppressInAnimationForRespinLockedPos accepts RespinLockedSet parameter; RecoverSpinAck moved RespinLockedPos from RoundInfo to PlateInfo level</completed>
  <next_steps>Primary session reviewing repro+quality findings: (1) revert DebugToolManager.m_enableDebugTools to false or exclude from commit (HIGH security risk if deployed), (2) decide HandleRespinGame fate (delete per §10.5 or explicitly flag BC-8暫緩刪除 with user approval), (3) annotate ForEndToNext unreachable IsRespinGame branch as "v2不可達防禦性保留", (4) document MULTIPLIER_EVENT commented blocks as "WIP separate from Respin", (5) add AssertLockedConsistency comment about spec P-3 vs real data牴觸. Preparing to explain detailed state flow for respin_and_freegame.json scenario: MainGame plate[0] locks positions → plate[1] empty RespinLockedPos triggers NextFeverGameType=1 → LEAVE_RESPIN sees IsGoingToFree=true → ENTER_FREE → FG rounds 1-13 each with own Respin chains following same dual-index loop pattern</next_steps>
  <notes>Real server packet validation removes all "待 server 對拍" uncertainty flags: V-2 invariant confirmed, FeaturePosQueue/AwardDataVec per-plate distribution understood, col 0/5 in RespinLockedPos verified (spec P-3 outdated). Repro+quality review surfaced two uncommitted/orphan issues requiring resolution before merge—m_enableDebugTools=true is HIGH risk per earlier security review, must not accidentally deploy. MULTIPLIER_EVENT disabled blocks confirmed as parallel WIP, not Respin refactor artifacts—separation important for change tracking. Mystery揭示 guard改寫 (from !IsInMG to nextPlate existence) newly enables MG Respin Mystery, flagged B-1 for server樣本驗證. ForEndToNext IsRespinGame branch technically unreachable but acceptable defensive fallback—§9取捨⑤ 已知並選擇不刪. All core Respin flow validated clean: CheckState priority reorder, ENTER_RESPIN first-hand/continuation unified path, dual-index cursor唯一推進點, accumulated win per-hand granularity, LeaveRespinState三分支派發 timing for旗艦場景</notes>
</summary>

content:
<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>StructuredOutput</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-11T13:09:28.606Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\Cocos_Project\uk_872_eyestrike2_client</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"lens\":\"correctness\",\"findings\":[{\"severity\":\"medium\",\"where\":\".claude_temp/respin_and_freegame.json vs P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3 / EnterRespinState.ts:84-122\",\"problem\":\"設計規格 P-3 假設 RespinLockedPos「只含 col1-4」，但真實回包逐筆解碼證實 col0/5 也在 RespinLockedPos 內（Round0 sub0=[0,1,2,3,6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16,20,21,22,23]，其中 0-3=col0、20-23=col5，整列 8 格全鎖）。已 commit 的 EnterRespinState.HandleReel 仍把全部 entry（含 col0/5）merge 進 m_respinLockedSet 並對全集合重建靜態圖；col0/5 既由 SetColumnLock 整列鎖定、又被 EffectPlate 疊靜態張 → 視覺上雙重鎖定/可能蓋圖錯亂。這正是未 commit 的 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true 要修的問題。\",\"fix\":\"未 commit 的 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC 開關處理方向正確（只跳過 col0/5 的靜態張重建，不過濾 merge），且 AssertLockedConsistency 的 expected 聯集與 actual merge 都含 col0/5 故仍一致。但此修正目前停在 working tree 未提交，commit f2f739e 的版本在 col0/5 會疊冗餘靜態張。建議：(1) 盡快提交該開關修正；(2) 在 spec §3.1 P-3 更正「只含 col1-4」為「含 col0/5 整列」，避免後續維護者依錯誤前提；(3) 執行期確認 col0/5 跳過靜態張後、停輪畫面仍正確顯示鎖定符號（依賴 SetColumnLock 讓 reel 不轉留存原符號，屬 framework 行為）。\"},{\"severity\":\"medium\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/SpinState.ts:34 (ClearAll) + EnterRespinState.ts:99-122 (靜態圖重建時點)\",\"problem\":\"ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 骨架下，SPIN.OnEnter 每手都呼叫 ClearAll()（line 34），MG 局時 ClearAll→m_effectPlate.ReturnAll() 會回收 ENTER_RESPIN 剛建的鎖定靜態張。鎖定靜態圖靠『下一個 ENTER_RESPIN 重建』維持，但整局最後一手 SPIN 之後是 LEAVE_RESPIN（不再有 ENTER_RESPIN），∴ 最後一手 plate 播放期間，col1-4 鎖定位置的靜態張已被該手 SPIN 的 ClearAll 清掉且不再重建 → 最後一手畫面可能缺少鎖定符號靜態覆蓋（依賴 reel 自身停輪結果是否正好等於鎖定符號，屬 framework 行為，spec §5.3-6 已標『實作時確認』未驗 A 級）。FreeGame 局因 ClearAll 內 !IsFreeGame guard 不呼叫 ReturnAll，靜態張倖存，行為不同於 MG。\",\"fix\":\"執行期以 server 真實 Respin 回包（本 json 14 局）對拍 MG 局（Round0）與 FG 局（Round1/3）最後一手停輪畫面，確認鎖定位置顯示一致。若 MG 最後一手出現鎖定符號缺失，於 SPIN 或 LEAVE_RESPIN 重建一次靜態圖，或讓 SuppressInAnimationForRespinLockedPos 之外另保留靜態層不被 ReturnAll 回收。此為 spec 已知未驗點，非阻斷但需上線前實測。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/RoundEndState.ts:41-46 (commit 81f1f76)\",\"problem\":\"審查範圍含 commit 81f1f76（倍率事件註解），其中 RoundEndState 的 ResetMultiplierToBase() 與 CheckAndPlayActivateEffectEnd() 兩個 round-end 呼叫被整段註解掉。前者負責每局結束把倍率重置回 SpinAck.MultiplierIndex 初始值，註解後跨局倍率不再歸零 → 與 Respin 雙層重構正交，但會改變 round-end 倍率行為，可能是非預期回歸（commit message 稱『簡化事件處理』未說明刻意停用 round-end 重置）。\",\"fix\":\"確認 ResetMultiplierToBase 停用是否為刻意（倍率系統改由他處管理）。若非刻意，恢復 RoundEndState:42/46 兩呼叫；若刻意，補註解說明倍率重置改由何處負責，避免後續誤判為遺漏。屬 respin 重構範圍外的並行改動，建議與本次重構分離評估。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts:241-256 (HandleRespinGame 孤兒)\",\"problem\":\"刪除 unshow 的 IsRespinGame 死碼分支後，HandleRespinGame() 呼叫者歸零（grep 確認僅剩自身定義 + 註解引用），成為本次改動造成的 orphan。依 CLAUDE.md §10.5『你的改動造成的 orphan → 刪除』本應移除，但 spec §5.7/BC-8 刻意保留待 unshow Respin 上線實測接線。\",\"fix\":\"可接受的 documented 例外（已加 ⚠️ BC-8 註解說明保留理由）。待 BC-8 unshow Respin 實測後二擇一：恢復呼叫或刪除。目前不影響正確性，僅為紀律偏離，建議在問題追蹤記一筆待清理。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameView.ts:556-563 (m_isRespinGame 生命週期) + RoundEndState.ts:32 / ResetPlateCursor\",\"problem\":\"m_isRespinGame 僅由 EnterRespinState:48 設 true、LeaveRespinState:30 清 false。ResetPlateCursor()（idle/round-end 兜底）清 m_curSubPlateIndex 與 m_respinLockedSet 但不清 m_isRespinGame。正常流程一定經 LEAVE_RESPIN 清旗標，但若 Respin 局中途異常中止（斷線後非經 LEAVE_RESPIN 重入），m_isRespinGame 可能殘留 true。此為 pre-existing 行為（重構前 unshow 反而會重設），非本次新引入回歸。\",\"fix\":\"非阻斷。建議在 ResetPlateCursor() 一併重設 m_isRespinGame=false 作為兜底，使『游標歸位』與『Respin 身分歸位』同源（與既有 m_respinLockedSet 一併清的設計一致），降低異常路徑殘留風險。\"}]}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"\"Structured output provided successfully\""</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\DebugToolManager.ts\",\"content\":\"import { _decorator, Component, sys, log, error, Input, input, EventKeyboard, KeyCode, profiler } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport protocol from \\\"@igs-arcade-division-rd2/uk_872_eyestrike2_proto/ar2es2Proto.js\\\";\\nimport { eventManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\\n\\nconst { ccclass, property } = _decorator;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 除錯工具事件定義\\n */\\nexport const DEBUG_TOOL_EVENT = {\\n    /**@ch GameView 接收到 Spin 資料 - 參數: (data: Uint8Array) */\\n    SPIN_DATA_RECEIVED: \\\"DEBUG_TOOL_EVENT_SPIN_DATA_RECEIVED\\\",\\n\\n    /**@ch GameView 請求取得待用的 Spin 資料 - 參數: (func(spinAck: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ISpinAck) => void) */\\n    GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA: \\\"DEBUG_TOOL_EVENT_GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA\\\",\\n\\n    /**@ch GameView 通知已使用待用資料，請求清除 */\\n    CLEAR_PENDING_SPIN_DATA: \\\"DEBUG_TOOL_EVENT_CLEAR_PENDING_SPIN_DATA\\\"\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 除錯工具管理器\\n * @description 提供 Spin 資料的下載、上傳、重放等除錯功能\\n * @note 此工具僅在開發環境下啟用，正式版本會被編譯器移除\\n */\\n@ccclass('DebugToolManager')\\nexport class DebugToolManager extends Component {\\n\\n    /**@ch 啟用除錯功能（只在開發環境生效）*/\\n    private m_enableDebugTools: boolean = true;\\n\\n    /**@ch 最後一次 spin 的原始資料 */\\n    private m_lastSpinData: Uint8Array = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 待用的除錯 Spin 資料（用於下次 Spin 時替換 Server 資料）*/\\n    private m_pendingSpinData: protocol.ar2es2Proto.ISpinAck = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 按鍵狀態追蹤 */\\n    private m_isCtrlPressed: boolean = false;\\n    private m_isAltPressed: boolean = false;\\n    private m_isShowProfiler: boolean = false;\\n\\n    //#region 生命週期\\n\\n    onLoad() {\\n        // 只在開發環境且非原生平台時啟用\\n        if (!this.IsDebugEnvironment()) {\\n            this.enabled = false;\\n            return;\\n        }\",\"numLines\":50,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":456}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\GameState\\\\EnterRespinState.ts\",\"content\":\"import { _decorator } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport GameView from \\\"../GameView\\\";\\nimport { log } from \\\"cc\\\";\\nimport { BaseState, eventManager, stateManager } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/Managers\\\";\\nimport Game_Define from \\\"../Game_Define\\\";\\nimport { RESPIN_UI_EVENT } from \\\"../Respin/RespinUIManager\\\";\\nimport { Common } from \\\"../Common/Common\\\";\\nimport { Define, CommonState } from \\\"db://astarte-framework/utilis\\\";\\nimport { ResolveLockedEntries } from \\\"../Respin/RespinPlateLogic\\\";\\n\\nconst { ccclass } = _decorator;\\n\\n@ccclass( \\\"EnterRespinState\\\" )\\nexport class EnterRespinState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 首手進場等待時間（秒） */\\n    private static readonly WAIT_TIME = 0.8;\\n\\n    /**@ch 宣告動畫開關（預留接縫）：預設不播；連首手都不播。\\n     * 未來若要恢復「首手播 Respin 宣告動畫」，改為 true 即可（續轉手一律不播）。 */\\n    private static readonly PLAY_ENTER_ANIM: boolean = false;\\n\\n    /**@ch col 0/5 靜態張排除開關：true=重建靜態圖時跳過 col 0/5（RespinLockColumns）。\\n     * 這兩列已由 SetColumnLock 整輪鎖定（reel 不轉、原符號自然留存），毋須 EffectPlate 再疊靜態張。\\n     * server 改為 RespinLockedPos 含 col 0/5 後集合會帶這兩列 entry，故以此開關控制是否略過顯示處理。\\n     * 設 false 則回復「對集合內所有 entry（含 col 0/5）都疊靜態張」的舊行為。 */\\n    private static readonly EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC: boolean = true;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n        this.m_gameView = gameView;\\n    }\\n\\n    public async OnEnter()\\n    {\\n        console.log( \\\"OnEnter State: ENTER_RESPIN\\\" );\\n\\n        // 首手 / 續轉分流：首手時 IsRespinGame 尚未設為 true\\n        const isFirstHand = !this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame;\\n\\n        if ( isFirstHand )\\n        {\\n            // 首手進場：緩衝等待 → 設 Respin 狀態 → 清盤（鎖列在 HandleReel 內處理）\\n            await Define.Wait( this.m_gameView, EnterRespinState.WAIT_TIME );\\n            this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame = true;\\n            this.m_gameView.ClearAll();\\n        }\\n\\n        // 累加本手鎖定位置 + 以累積集合冪等重建靜態圖（首手與續轉同邏輯）\\n        this.HandleReel();\\n\\n        // 宣告動畫：可開關，僅首手且開關開啟時播（預設不播，續轉手一律不播）\\n        if ( isFirstHand && EnterRespinState.PLAY_ENTER_ANIM )\\n        {\\n            await this.PlayRespinEnterAnimation();\\n        }\\n\\n        // 去向改 SPIN（v2 骨架）：plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END，續轉播下一手 plate；\\n        // 整局 plate 用盡後由 CheckState ② 走 LEAVE_RESPIN → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級一次）\\n        stateManager.NextState( CommonState.SPIN );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理轉輪鎖定：col 0/5 整輪鎖 + 累加 server 給定的鎖定位置，並冪等重建靜態圖\\n     *\\n     * 鎖定位置來源 = 「剛播完那手」PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（server 給的增量 serverPos[]，含 col 0/5）。\\n     * ENTER_RESPIN 在 SPIN 推進 sub 之前執行，故 CurSubPlateIndex 仍指向剛播完的 plate。\\n     */\\n    private HandleReel(): void\\n    {\\n        // col 0/5 整輪鎖定（固定規則）：reel 不轉、原符號自然留存，視覺鎖定不靠 EffectPlate 靜態張\\n        Game_Define.RespinLockColumns.forEach( column => {\\n            this.m_gameView.SlotReels.SetColumnLock( column, true );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // 讀「剛播完那手」的鎖定位置（server 增量），解碼後累加進 GameView 累積集合\\n        const plate = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.[ this.m_gameView.CurSubPlateIndex ];\\n        const { entries, warnings } = ResolveLockedEntries(\\n            plate?.PlateSymbol,\\n            plate?.RespinLockedPos,\\n            Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n        );\\n        warnings.forEach( w => console.warn( `[EnterRespinState] ${w}` ) );\\n        this.m_gameView.MergeRespinLocks( entries );\\n\\n        // 以「累積集合」全量冪等重建靜態圖——續轉手不依賴前一手演出殘留，可重入\\n        this.m_gameView.RespinLockedSet.forEach( entry =>\\n        {\\n            const { col, row, symbol, number } = entry;\\n\\n            // col 0/5 已由   {\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            // CollectAndRetrigger 在 Respin 鎖定時顯示為 Collect 靜態張\\n            const displaySymbol = ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.CollectAndRetrigger )\\n                ? Game_Define.Symbol.Collect\\n                : symbol;\\n\\n            // 清掉該位置殘留的 Spine 節點（停輪時建立的），避免蓋住靜態張\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CleanSymbolSpineAt( col, row, Game_Define.LAYERS.TWO, false );\\n\\n            // 關閉原本格子的靜態圖，改用 EffectPlate 疊一張靜態圖\\n            this.m_gameView.SlotReels.AllColumns?.[ Game_Define.MIDDLE_PLATE_INDEX ]?.[ col ]?.HideSymbolByRow( row );\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode( col, row, displaySymbol, number );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 Respin 進入動畫\\n     */\\n    private async PlayRespinEnterAnimation(): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"=== PlayRespinEnterAnimation ===\\\" );\\n\\n        await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(RESPIN_UI_EVENT.PLAY_RESPI_DECLARE_ANIM, () => {\\n                log(\\\"Respin 宣告動畫播放完成\\\");\\n                resolve();\\n            });\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":140,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":140}}"</outcome>

dt: number )\\n    {\\n        this.m_gameView.SlotReels.Spin( dt );\\n        if ( !this.m_gameView.SlotReels.IsStop || this.m_isPreWinEffectPlayed || !this.m_gameView.SlotReels.IsEntryEffectDone  const isFirstHand = !this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame;\\n\\n        if ( isFirstHand )\\n        {\\n            // 首手進場：緩衝等待 → 設 Respin 狀態 → 清盤（鎖列在 HandleReel 內處理）\\n            await Define.Wait( 以「累積集合」全量冪等重建靜態圖——續轉手不依賴前一手演出殘留，可重入\\n        this.m_gameView.RespinLockedSet.forEach( entry =>\\n        {\\n            const { col, row, symbol, number } = entry;\\n\\n            // col 0/5 已由
