  {\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            // CollectAndRetrigger 在 Respin 鎖定時顯示為 Collect 靜態張\\n            const displaySymbol = ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.CollectAndRetrigger )\\n                ? Game_Define.Symbol.Collect\\n                : symbol;\\n\\n            // 清掉該位置殘留的 Spine 節點（停輪時建立的），避免蓋住靜態張\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CleanSymbolSpineAt( col, row, Game_Define.LAYERS.TWO, false );\\n\\n            // 關閉原本格子的靜態圖，改用 EffectPlate 疊一張靜態圖\\n            this.m_gameView.SlotReels.AllColumns?.[ Game_Define.MIDDLE_PLATE_INDEX ]?.[ col ]?.HideSymbolByRow( row );\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode( col, row, displaySymbol, number );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 Respin 進入動畫\\n     */\\n    private async PlayRespinEnterAnimation(): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"=== PlayRespinEnterAnimation ===\\\" );\\n\\n        await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(RESPIN_UI_EVENT.PLAY_RESPI_DECLARE_ANIM, () => {\\n                log(\\\"Respin 宣告動畫播放完成\\\");\\n                resolve();\\n            });\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":140,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":140}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

EnterRespinState.ts:84-122\",\"problem\":\"設計規格 P-3 假設 RespinLockedPos「只含 col1-4」，但真實回包逐筆解碼證實 col0/5 也在 RespinLockedPos 內（Round0 sub0=[0,1,2,3,6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16,20,21,22,23]，其中 0-3=col0、20-23=col5，整列 8 格全鎖）。已 commit 的 EnterRespinState.HandleReel 仍把全部 entry（含 col0/5）merge 進 m_respinLockedSet 並對全集合重建靜態圖；col0/5 既由 SetColumnLock 整列鎖定、又被 EffectPlate 疊靜態張 → 視覺上雙重鎖定/可能蓋圖錯亂。這正是未 commit 的 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true 要修的問題。\",\"fix\":\"未 commit 的 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC 開關處理方向正確（只跳過 col0/5 的靜態張重建，不過濾 merge），且 AssertLockedConsistency 的 expected 聯集與 actual merge 都含 col0/5 故仍一致。但此修正目前停在 working tree 未提交，commit f2f739e 的版本在 col0/5 會疊冗餘靜態張。建議：(1) 盡快提交該開關修正；(2) 在 spec §3.1 P-3 更正「只含 col1-4」為「含 col0/5 整列」，避免後續維護者依錯誤前提；(3) 執行期確認 col0/5 跳過靜態張後、停輪畫面仍正確顯示鎖定符號（依賴 SetColumnLock 讓 reel 不轉留存原符號，屬 framework 行為）。\"},{\"severity\":\"medium\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/SpinState.ts:34 (ClearAll) + EnterRespinState.ts:99-122 (靜態圖重建時點)\",\"problem\":\"ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 骨架下，SPIN.OnEnter 每手都呼叫 ClearAll()（line 34），MG 局時 ClearAll→m_effectPlate.ReturnAll() 會回收 ENTER_RESPIN 剛建的鎖定靜態張。鎖定靜態圖靠『下一個 ENTER_RESPIN 重建』維持，但整局最後一手 SPIN 之後是 LEAVE_RESPIN（不再有 ENTER_RESPIN），∴ 最後一手 plate 播放期間，col1-4 鎖定位置的靜態張已被該手 SPIN 的 ClearAll 清掉且不再重建 → 最後一手畫面可能缺少鎖定符號靜態覆蓋（依賴 reel 自身停輪結果是否正好等於鎖定符號，屬 framework 行為，spec §5.3-6 已標『實作時確認』未驗 A 級）。FreeGame 局因 ClearAll 內 !IsFreeGame guard 不呼叫 ReturnAll，靜態張倖存，行為不同於 MG。\",\"fix\":\"執行期以 server 真實 Respin 回包（本 json 14 局）對拍 MG 局（Round0）與 FG 局（Round1/3）最後一手停輪畫面，確認鎖定位置顯示一致。若 MG 最後一手出現鎖定符號缺失，於 SPIN 或 LEAVE_RESPIN 重建一次靜態圖，或讓 SuppressInAnimationForRespinLockedPos 之外另保留靜態層不被 ReturnAll 回收。此為 spec 已知未驗點，非阻斷但需上線前實測。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/RoundEndState.ts:41-46 (commit 81f1f76)\",\"problem\":\"審查範圍含 commit 81f1f76（倍率事件註解），其中 RoundEndState 的 ResetMultiplierToBase() 與 CheckAndPlayActivateEffectEnd() 兩個 round-end 呼叫被整段註解掉。前者負責每局結束把倍率重置回 SpinAck.MultiplierIndex 初始值，註解後跨局倍率不再歸零 → 與 Respin 雙層重構正交，但會改變 round-end 倍率行為，可能是非預期回歸（commit message 稱『簡化事件處理』未說明刻意停用 round-end 重置）。\",\"fix\":\"確認 ResetMultiplierToBase 停用是否為刻意（倍率系統改由他處管理）。若非刻意，恢復 RoundEndState:42/46 兩呼叫；若刻意，補註解說明倍率重置改由何處負責，避免後續誤判為遺漏。屬 respin 重構範圍外的並行改動，建議與本次重構分離評估。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts:241-256 (HandleRespinGame 孤兒)\",\"problem\":\"刪除 unshow 的 IsRespinGame 死碼分支後，HandleRespinGame() 呼叫者歸零（grep 確認僅剩自身定義 + 註解引用），成為本次改動造成的 orphan。依 CLAUDE.md §10.5『你的改動造成的 orphan → 刪除』本應移除，但 spec §5.7/BC-8 刻意保留待 unshow Respin 上線實測接線。\",\"fix\":\"可接受的 documented 例外（已加 ⚠️ BC-8 註解說明保留理由）。待 BC-8 unshow Respin 實測後二擇一：恢復呼叫或刪除。目前不影響正確性，僅為紀律偏離，建議在問題追蹤記一筆待清理。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameView.ts:556-563 (m_isRespinGame 生命週期) + RoundEndState.ts:32 / ResetPlateCursor\",\"problem\":\"m_isRespinGame 僅由 EnterRespinState:48 設 true、LeaveRespinState:30 清 false。ResetPlateCursor()（idle/round-end 兜底）清 m_curSubPlateIndex 與 m_respinLockedSet 但不清 m_isRespinGame。正常流程一定經 LEAVE_RESPIN 清旗標，但若 Respin 局中途異常中止（斷線後非經 LEAVE_RESPIN 重入），m_isRespinGame 可能殘留 true。此為 pre-existing 行為（重構前 unshow 反而會重設），非本次新引入回歸。\",\"fix\":\"非阻斷。建議在 ResetPlateCursor() 一併重設 m_isRespinGame=false 作為兜底，使『游標歸位』與『Respin 身分歸位』同源（與既有 m_respinLockedSet 一併清的設計一致），降低異常路徑殘留風險。\"}]}"</parameters>

The user is showing me more observed session data. Let me process what's being shown:

1. Multiplier commit 81f1f76 inspection - confirms it's a separate refactor commit specifically for commenting out multiplier event dispatches, with its own commit message. This validates that the MULTIPLIER_EVENT changes are indeed WIP separate from Respin.

2. SetNowRoundInfo and cursor method callers - shows the write points for dual-index methods are correctly confined to the identified state files (SpinState, IdleState, RoundEndState, UnshowPrepareState, EnterRespinState, LeaveRespinState).

3. Orphaned methods check - confirms PlayRespinEnterAnimation still has a caller (EnterRespinState:58), GetSymbolInRealPlateInfo still used. HandleRespinGame has no active callers (only comment references at UnshowPrepareState:102-103, 249).

4. CheckPreWinEffect examination - shows SpinState handles omen (MysteryEventKind) as round-level event, with early return for Respin continuation hands (CurSubPlateIndex > 0).

5. EnterFreeState entry assumption - comment at line 104-105 notes "EnterFreeState 進入時 CurPlateIndex 仍是 main game 的值", explaining why it uses +1 offset.

6. IsRespinGame set point - only EnterRespinState:48 sets it to true, confirming controlled write point.

7. Col 0/5 data validation - Round0 sub0 has 16 total locks: 8 in col0/5 positions [0,1,2,3,20,21,22,23], 8 in col1-4. This confirms server includes col0/5 despite spec P-3 saying "只含 col1-4".
The multiplier commit stands as its own refactor work, separate from the Respin changes. HandleRespinGame is confirmed dead code with only stale comment references. The col0/5 lock data from the server contradicts the specification, yet the EXCLUDE logic properly filters these positions. CheckPreWinEffect correctly treats omen as a round-level event and short-circuits on continuation hands. The EnterFreeState timing note clarifies why the cursor offset is necessary at that transition point.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Multiplier event commenting confirmed as separate commit 81f1f76 unrelated to Respin refactor</title>
  <subtitle>Git history shows explicit "refactor: 註解多個腳本中的倍率事件派發" commit from 2026-06-11, 10 files modified for multiplier WIP</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Commit 81f1f76 authored 2026-06-11 16:44:07 with message "refactor: 註解多個腳本中的倍率事件派發"</fact>
    <fact>Commit message explicitly lists: "註解 GameDataCache、SlotReels、FeatureWheelManager、FreeGameYouWin、EnterFreeState、LeaveFreeState、ScatterShowState、WaitResState、MultiplierManager 和 PreWinManager 中與倍率功能相關的多個事件派發呼叫"</fact>
    <fact>Commit touched 10 files with "+78, -64" delta, separate from Respin dual-index refactor commits</fact>
    <fact>Commit message rationale: "此變更是簡化事件處理並提升程式碼可維護性的一部分"</fact>
    <fact>Files modified align with MULTIPLIER_EVENT dispatches seen commented in review diff (ScatterShowState, EnterFreeState, RoundEndState not in this commit's stat but likely earlier)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Git history confirms MULTIPLIER_EVENT commenting is tracked separate concern with explicit commit. Commit 81f1f76 from June 11 16:44 (same day as Respin work) has dedicated refactor message listing 10 files where multiplier-related event dispatches were commented out: GameDataCache, SlotReels, FeatureWheelManager, FreeGameYouWin, EnterFreeState, LeaveFreeState, ScatterShowState, WaitResState, MultiplierManager, PreWinManager. Rationale given as "simplifying event handling and improving code maintainability"—suggests deliberate architectural change rather than accidental breakage. This validates earlier assessment that MULTIPLIER_EVENT disabled blocks are WIP separate from Respin refactor, not artifacts of dual-index changes. Some files seen in review diff (RoundEndState) may be in earlier/later commits of multiplier rework. Separate commit tracking means: (1) multiplier disable is intentional documented change, (2) can be reverted independently if needed, (3) not tied to Respin P1 success/failure, (4) review findings about "MULTIPLIER WIP" correctly identified it as orthogonal concern. Recommendation remains: add inline comments in affected files noting "乘倍系統重做中暫停 (commit 81f1f76)，勿視為 Respin 重構死碼" to prevent future /dev-review cycles questioning why currentMultiplier hardcoded 0 or activate effects skipped.</narrative>

  <narrative>Grep validation confirms HandleRespinGame method orphaned by this refactor with zero active callers. Method body exists at UnshowPrepareState:247 (starts with log statement), but deleted唯一呼叫點 at lines 99-103 where original code called "if(IsRespinGame) HandleRespinGame()" during unshow Respin recovery. Author添加註解 "暫留供 BC-8 實測接線" indicating intent to preserve method for future Respin disconnect testing, but this violates project §10.5 orphan removal policy which requires immediate deletion of methods orphaned by contributor's own changes. Contrast with PlayRespinEnterAnimation (still called from EnterRespinState:58) and GetSymbolInRealPlateInfo (7+ active callers across EffectPlate/FeatureShowController/ScatterShowState)—those remain active. Repro+quality review correctly flagged as MEDIUM severity: either (1) delete method body now per §10.5 (can restore from git history if BC-8 proves need), or (2) get explicit user/tech-lead approval to mark as "本次 orphan 暫緩刪除待 BC-8上線實測" exception with tracking ticket, document in commit message—don't silent-retain violating coding standard. Method is ~50 lines handling col 0/5 SetColumnLock and static display for unshow Respin mid-state restoration; new strategy replays from plate 0 making mid-state restoration unnecessary, but BC-8 flag suggests uncertainty whether full replay acceptable for all Respin disconnect scenarios.</narrative>

    <fact>EnterRespinState.EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true skips col0/5 from EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode loop (lines 104-109)</fact>
    <fact>SetColumnLock(0/5, true) at line 86-87 mechanically locks col0/5 reels (prevents rotation, symbols naturally persist)</fact>

  <narrative>Real packet data resolves spec P-3 vs implementation discrepancy: server's RespinLockedPos arrays include col 0/5 positions, contradicting spec's documented claim "只含 col1-4（中間四列）". Round[0] first plate's 16 locks split 50/50: positions [0,1,2,3,20,21,22,23] decode to col0 rows 0-3 and col5 rows 0-3 (8 edge positions), while [6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16] decode to col1-4 middle area (8 interior positions). This validates EnterRespinState's EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true toggle: GameView.MergeRespinLocks (line 97) accumulates all 16 positions into RespinLockedSet including col0/5 entries, but HandleReel's static display rebuild loop (lines 100-125) checks "if col in RespinLockColumns [0,5] → return" skipping EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode for edge columns. Rationale: col0/5 already visually locked via SetColumnLock(true) at lines 86-87—reels won't spin, original symbols persist naturally, overlaying additional static sprites redundant and risks z-order conflicts. Without EXCLUDE toggle, would create duplicate static displays on top of already-frozen reel symbols. LeaveRespinState.AssertLockedConsistency (line 66-87) remains sound: it compares accumulated RespinLockedSet.keys (contains all 16 including col0/5) against union of PlateQueue[*].RespinLockedPos (also contains all 16 including col0/5)—both include edge columns so sets match, assertion passes. Spec P-3 outdated or describes earlier protocol version; implementation correctly handles actual server behavior as-delivered.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>SpinState CheckPreWinEffect implements round-level omen handling with Respin continuation early-return</title>
  <subtitle>MysteryEventKind播放 restricted to CurSubPlateIndex===0 (round首手), preventing Respin連鎖手 from重播 omen演出</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>CheckPreWinEffect line 141-145: if CurSubPlateIndex > 0 (Respin continuation hand) → early return without playing omen</fact>
    <fact>Comment: "Respin 續轉手（sub>0）：omen（MysteryEventKind）屬 round 級事件，每局至多播一次，續轉手早退不重播"</fact>
    <fact>Reference to "§6 per-手重入矩陣" suggests documented reentry semantics for which round-level events replay per-hand</fact>
    <fact>Omen播放 logic remains in lines 167-174 for FG/Respin rounds: reads nowRound.MysteryEventKind and calls PlayPreWinEffect if >0</fact>
    <fact>PreWinHandledIndex reset in SpinState:66-69 only when CurSubPlateIndex===0 (換局), avoiding "上一手殘留誤觸 IF 分支造成 omen 重播"</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>SpinState.CheckPreWinEffect implements round-level event filtering to prevent inappropriate per-hand replays during Respin chains. MysteryEventKind (omen pre-win effect—mystery symbol appearance預告/震動) is RoundInfo-level metadata,播放一次 per round regardless of how many plates that round contains. Line 141 guard "if CurSubPlateIndex > 0 → return" ensures Respin continuation hands (second/third/fourth spins in連鎖) skip omen check entirely—only首手 (sub===0) evaluates MysteryEventKind and potentially plays omen animation. Comment references "§6 per-手重入矩陣" (per-hand reentry matrix) implying documented design decision about which演出 elements replay on每個 Respin hand vs once-per-round. Prevents UX issue: imagine 4-plate Respin where mystery omen plays震動 four times instead of once. Coordinates with PreWinHandledIndex reset logic (SpinState:66-69): index only resets when換局 (sub===0 after AdvancePlateCursor), not on Respin continuation—if reset every hand, "上一手殘留" PreWinHandledIndex could cause omen重播 bug. Design ensures omen/mystery-event播放 tied to round lifecycle (播once at round首手) not plate lifecycle (would播 N times for N-plate round). Similar pattern likely applies to other round-level演出: FG entry animation, round結算畫面, etc.—play once per RoundInfo, not replayed for each PlateInfo within that round.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>EnterFreeState entry timing assumes CurPlateIndex still points to MainGame round before advancement</title>
  <subtitle>Comment notes FG entry occurs before cursor advances to FG round, explains +1 offset for fileIndex lookup</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>EnterFreeState.ts line 104 comment: "注意：EnterFreeState 進入時 CurPlateIndex 仍是 main game 的值，但要播的是 FreeGame round 1"</fact>
    <fact>Line 105 explains: "顯式傳入 +1 偏移取得正確的 fileIndex（與 SetRealPlateInfo 用 CurPlateIndex+1 取資料的語意對齊）"</fact>
    <fact>State flow: MainGame completes → LEAVE_RESPIN (if Respin) or ROUND_END → CHECK → (IsGoingToFree) ENTER_FREE → sets IsFreeGame=true → SPIN advances cursor</fact>
    <fact>EnterFreeState does not call AdvancePlateCursor—cursor advancement happens in subsequent SpinState.OnEnter (line 63)</fact>
    <fact>SetNowRoundInfo唯一呼叫點在SpinState:77, after AdvancePlateCursor, reads SpinAck.RoundQueue[CurPlateIndex] (now pointing to FG round)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>EnterFreeState timing comment reveals cursor advancement choreography for MainGame→FreeGame transition. When ENTER_FREE executes, CurPlateIndex still holds MainGame round index (0 for旗艦場景 where MG round 0 triggers FG via NextFeverGameType=1), not yet advanced to FreeGame round 1. This explains why EnterFreeState code uses "+1 offset" when looking up data—it needs to access FreeGame round 1's metadata (for演出/UI setup) before SpinState has advanced cursor to that round. Flow sequence: (1) MG round 0 completes all plates → LEAVE_RESPIN or CHECK dispatches ENTER_FREE with CurPlateIndex still=0, (2) ENTER_FREE.OnEnter performs FG entry演出 (transition animation, UI switch), uses CurPlateIndex+1 to peek ahead at FG round 1 data for fileIndex, (3) sets IsFreeGame=true flag, (4) dispatches SPIN, (5) SpinState.OnEnter calls AdvancePlateCursor (line 63) advancing cursor from (0,x) to (1,0), (6) SpinState:77 calls SetNowRoundInfo reading RoundQueue[CurPlateIndex] now correctly pointing to FG round 1. This "peek-ahead then advance" pattern maintains invariant: SetNowRoundInfo always reads RoundQueue[CurPlateIndex] without offset because cursor pre-advanced to correct round. Comment documents this subtle timing dependency—if EnterFreeState accidentally advanced cursor itself, SetNowRoundInfo would read round 2 instead of round 1, breaking FG first spin. Similar pattern likely for ENTER_RESPIN (cursor points to round that just triggered Respin, ENTER_RESPIN performs entry演出, SPIN advances to play next hand).</narrative>

    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>

EnterRespinState.ts:84-122\",\"problem\":\"設計規格 P-3 假設 RespinLockedPos「只含 col1-4」，但真實回包逐筆解碼證實 col0/5 也在 RespinLockedPos 內（Round0 sub0=[0,1,2,3,6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16,20,21,22,23]，其中 0-3=col0、20-23=col5，整列 8 格全鎖）。已 commit 的 EnterRespinState.HandleReel 仍把全部 entry（含 col0/5）merge 進 m_respinLockedSet 並對全集合重建靜態圖；col0/5 既由 SetColumnLock 整列鎖定、又被 EffectPlate 疊靜態張 → 視覺上雙重鎖定/可能蓋圖錯亂。這正是未 commit 的 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true 要修的問題。\",\"fix\":\"未 commit 的 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC 開關處理方向正確（只跳過 col0/5 的靜態張重建，不過濾 merge），且 AssertLockedConsistency 的 expected 聯集與 actual merge 都含 col0/5 故仍一致。但此修正目前停在 working tree 未提交，commit f2f739e 的版本在 col0/5 會疊冗餘靜態張。建議：(1) 盡快提交該開關修正；(2) 在 spec §3.1 P-3 更正「只含 col1-4」為「含 col0/5 整列」，避免後續維護者依錯誤前提；(3) 執行期確認 col0/5 跳過靜態張後、停輪畫面仍正確顯示鎖定符號（依賴 SetColumnLock 讓 reel 不轉留存原符號，屬 framework 行為）。\"},{\"severity\":\"medium\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/SpinState.ts:34 (ClearAll) + EnterRespinState.ts:99-122 (靜態圖重建時點)\",\"problem\":\"ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 骨架下，SPIN.OnEnter 每手都呼叫 ClearAll()（line 34），MG 局時 ClearAll→m_effectPlate.ReturnAll() 會回收 ENTER_RESPIN 剛建的鎖定靜態張。鎖定靜態圖靠『下一個 ENTER_RESPIN 重建』維持，但整局最後一手 SPIN 之後是 LEAVE_RESPIN（不再有 ENTER_RESPIN），∴ 最後一手 plate 播放期間，col1-4 鎖定位置的靜態張已被該手 SPIN 的 ClearAll 清掉且不再重建 → 最後一手畫面可能缺少鎖定符號靜態覆蓋（依賴 reel 自身停輪結果是否正好等於鎖定符號，屬 framework 行為，spec §5.3-6 已標『實作時確認』未驗 A 級）。FreeGame 局因 ClearAll 內 !IsFreeGame guard 不呼叫 ReturnAll，靜態張倖存，行為不同於 MG。\",\"fix\":\"執行期以 server 真實 Respin 回包（本 json 14 局）對拍 MG 局（Round0）與 FG 局（Round1/3）最後一手停輪畫面，確認鎖定位置顯示一致。若 MG 最後一手出現鎖定符號缺失，於 SPIN 或 LEAVE_RESPIN 重建一次靜態圖，或讓 SuppressInAnimationForRespinLockedPos 之外另保留靜態層不被 ReturnAll 回收。此為 spec 已知未驗點，非阻斷但需上線前實測。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/RoundEndState.ts:41-46 (commit 81f1f76)\",\"problem\":\"審查範圍含 commit 81f1f76（倍率事件註解），其中 RoundEndState 的 ResetMultiplierToBase() 與 CheckAndPlayActivateEffectEnd() 兩個 round-end 呼叫被整段註解掉。前者負責每局結束把倍率重置回 SpinAck.MultiplierIndex 初始值，註解後跨局倍率不再歸零 → 與 Respin 雙層重構正交，但會改變 round-end 倍率行為，可能是非預期回歸（commit message 稱『簡化事件處理』未說明刻意停用 round-end 重置）。\",\"fix\":\"確認 ResetMultiplierToBase 停用是否為刻意（倍率系統改由他處管理）。若非刻意，恢復 RoundEndState:42/46 兩呼叫；若刻意，補註解說明倍率重置改由何處負責，避免後續誤判為遺漏。屬 respin 重構範圍外的並行改動，建議與本次重構分離評估。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts:241-256 (HandleRespinGame 孤兒)\",\"problem\":\"刪除 unshow 的 IsRespinGame 死碼分支後，HandleRespinGame() 呼叫者歸零（grep 確認僅剩自身定義 + 註解引用），成為本次改動造成的 orphan。依 CLAUDE.md §10.5『你的改動造成的 orphan → 刪除』本應移除，但 spec §5.7/BC-8 刻意保留待 unshow Respin 上線實測接線。\",\"fix\":\"可接受的 documented 例外（已加 ⚠️ BC-8 註解說明保留理由）。待 BC-8 unshow Respin 實測後二擇一：恢復呼叫或刪除。目前不影響正確性，僅為紀律偏離，建議在問題追蹤記一筆待清理。\"},{\"severity\":\"low\",\"where\":\"assets/Script/GameView.ts:556-563 (m_isRespinGame 生命週期) + RoundEndState.ts:32 / ResetPlateCursor\",\"problem\":\"m_isRespinGame 僅由 EnterRespinState:48 設 true、LeaveRespinState:30 清 false。ResetPlateCursor()（idle/round-end 兜底）清 m_curSubPlateIndex 與 m_respinLockedSet 但不清 m_isRespinGame。正常流程一定經 LEAVE_RESPIN 清旗標，但若 Respin 局中途異常中止（斷線後非經 LEAVE_RESPIN 重入），m_isRespinGame 可能殘留 true。此為 pre-existing 行為（重構前 unshow 反而會重設），非本次新引入回歸。\",\"fix\":\"非阻斷。建議在 ResetPlateCursor() 一併重設 m_isRespinGame=false 作為兜底，使『游標歸位』與『Respin 身分歸位』同源（與既有 m_respinLockedSet 一併清的設計一致），降低異常路徑殘留風險。\"}]}"</parameters>

則回復「對集合內所有 entry（含 col 0/5）都疊靜態張」的舊行為。 */\\n    private static readonly EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC: boolean = true;\\n\\n    constructor( gameView: GameView )\\n    {\\n        super();\\n  const isFirstHand = !this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame;\\n\\n        if ( isFirstHand )\\n        {\\n            // 首手進場：緩衝等待 → 設 Respin 狀態 → 清盤（鎖列在 HandleReel 內處理）\\n            await Define.Wait(     stateManager.NextState( CommonState.SPIN );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理轉輪鎖定：col 0/5 整輪鎖 + 累加 以「累積集合」全量冪等重建靜態圖——續轉手不依賴前一手演出殘留，可重入\\n        this.m_gameView.RespinLockedSet.forEach( entry =>\\n        {\\n            const { col, row, symbol, number } = entry;\\n\\n            // col 0/5 已由 SetColumnLock 整輪鎖定（符號留存）；開關開啟時略過 EffectPlate 靜態張重建\\n            if ( EnterRespinState.EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC\\n                && Game_Define.RespinLockColumns.includes( col ) )\\n )\\nexport class EnterRespinState extends BaseState\\n{\\n    private m_gameView: GameView = null;\\n\\n    /**@ch 首手進場等待時間（秒） */\\n    private static readonly WAIT_TIME = 0.8;\\n\\n    /**@ch  const isFirstHand = !this.m_gameView.IsRespinGame;\\n\\n        if ( isFirstHand )\\n        {\\n            // 首手進場：緩衝等待 → 設 Respin 狀態 → 清盤（鎖列在 HandleReel 內處理）\\n            await Define.Wait( this.PlayRespinEnterAnimation();\\n        }\\n\\n        // 去向改 SPIN（v2 骨架）：plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END，續轉播下一手 plate；\\n        // 整局 plate 用盡後由 CheckState ② 走 LEAVE_RESPIN → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級一次）\\n        stateManager.NextState( CommonState.SPIN );\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnProcess()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    public OnLeave()\\n    {\\n\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理轉輪鎖定：col 0/5 整輪鎖 + 累加 this.m_gameView.SlotReels.SetColumnLock( column, true );\\n        } );\\n\\n        // 讀「剛播完那手」的鎖定位置（server 增量），解碼後累加進 GameView 累積集合\\n        const plate = this.m_gameView.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.[ Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n        );\\n        warnings.forEach( w => console.warn( `[EnterRespinState] ${w}` ) );\\n        this.m_gameView.MergeRespinLocks( entries );\\n\\n        // 以「累積集合」全量冪等重建靜態圖——續轉手不依賴前一手演出殘留，可重入\\n        this.m_gameView.RespinLockedSet.forEach( entry =>\\n        {\\n            const { col, row, symbol, number } = entry;\\n\\n            // col 0/5 已由 SetColumnLock 整輪鎖定（符號留存）；開關開啟時略過 EffectPlate 靜態張重建\\n            if ( EnterRespinState.EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC\\n                && Game_Define.RespinLockColumns.includes( col ) )\\n            {\\n                return;\\n            }\\n\\n            // CollectAndRetrigger 在 Respin 鎖定時顯示為 Collect 靜態張\\n            const displaySymbol = ( symbol === Game_Define.Symbol.CollectAndRetrigger )\\n                ? Game_Define.Symbol.Collect\\n                : symbol;\\n\\n            // 清掉該位置殘留的 Spine 節點（停輪時建立的），避免蓋住靜態張\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CleanSymbolSpineAt( col, row, Game_Define.LAYERS.TWO, false );\\n\\n            // 關閉原本格子的靜態圖，改用 EffectPlate 疊一張靜態圖\\n            this.m_gameView.SlotReels.AllColumns?.[ Game_Define.MIDDLE_PLATE_INDEX ]?.[ col ]?.HideSymbolByRow( row );\\n            this.m_gameView.EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode( col, row, displaySymbol, number );\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 播放 Respin 進入動畫\\n     */\\n    private async PlayRespinEnterAnimation(): Promise<void>\\n    {\\n        log( \\\"=== PlayRespinEnterAnimation ===\\\" );\\n\\n        await new Promise<void>((resolve) => {\\n            eventManager.Dispatch(RESPIN_UI_EVENT.PLAY_RESPI_DECLARE_ANIM, () => {\\n                log(\\\"Respin 宣告動畫播放完成\\\");\\n                resolve();\\n            });\\n        });\\n    }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":140,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":140}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>

sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>

content.thinking:
The primary session just ran a detailed correctness review and found several findings. Let me create observations documenting these discoveries:

1. **CRITICAL SECURITY FINDING**: `DebugToolManager.m_enableDebugTools = true` in working tree (line 30) - committed baseline is `false`. This enables Ctrl+Alt+U upload and Ctrl+Alt+D download in Web builds, allowing arbitrary SpinAck injection via `GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA` event. This is HIGH severity security risk if accidentally deployed to production.

2. **Col 0/5 in RespinLockedPos finding**: Real data shows Round[0] PlateQueue[0] has 16 locks including col 0/5 positions [0,1,2,3,20,21,22,23], contradicting spec P-3 claim "only col1-4". The uncommitted `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true` fix addresses this by skipping static sprite overlay for col 0/5 (which are already mechanically locked via SetColumnLock).

3. **ClearAll timing issue**: SPIN.OnEnter calls ClearAll() which calls m_effectPlate.ReturnAll() in MG (not FG due to IsFreeGame guard). This clears static sprites built by ENTER_RESPIN. For the last plate in a Respin chain, LEAVE_RESPIN follows (no more ENTER_RESPIN to rebuild), so last hand may lack static overlays for col1-4 locks.

4. **Multiplier event commenting**: Confirmed as separate commit 81f1f76 "refactor: 註解多個腳本中的倍率事件派發" touching 10 files, orthogonal to Respin refactor.

5. **HandleRespinGame orphan**: Zero active callers confirmed via grep, only comment references remain. Violates §10.5 orphan removal policy but has documented BC-8 exception annotation for future unshow Respin testing.
6. **RoundQueue structure validation**: The data confirms 14 rounds total—Round[0] in MG contains 2 plates while Rounds 1-13 across FG vary between 1-4 plates each, validating the multi-plate architecture spanning both game modes.

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>CRITICAL: DebugToolManager.m_enableDebugTools=true in working tree enables production debug tools, HIGH security risk if deployed</title>
  <subtitle>Uncommitted change flips toggle from committed baseline false→true, activating Ctrl+Alt+U SpinAck upload and window.__EYESTRIKE_DEBUG__ exposure in Web builds</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Line 30: `private m_enableDebugTools: boolean = true;` in working tree (git diff shows +true/-false delta)</fact>
    <fact>Committed baseline (HEAD f2f739e): `m_enableDebugTools: boolean = false;` confirmed via git show</fact>
    <fact>IsDebugEnvironment() line 82: `return isWebEnvironment && this.m_enableDebugTools;` — toggle gates all debug features</fact>
    <fact>When true in Web builds (sys.isNative=false): enables Ctrl+Alt+U file upload, Ctrl+Alt+D download, window.__EYESTRIKE_DEBUG__ exposure</fact>
    <fact>UploadAndLoadSpinData (lines 300-340) reads .bin file → ParseAndApplySpinData → decode SpinAck → sets m_pendingSpinData</fact>
    <fact>GameView.ts:1002-1016 GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA event: if pendingData exists, replaces server SpinAck with uploaded data before OnRecvSpinAck</fact>
    <fact>No build-time stripping: DebugToolManager instantiated via scene/prefab (grep .scene/.prefab shows 0 hits, likely attached to persistent GameView node)</fact>
    <fact>ExposeToWindow comment line 96: "可使用: window.__EYESTRIKE_DEBUG__" exposes DownloadLastSpinData/UploadAndLoadSpinData to browser console</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Working tree contains uncommitted HIGH-severity security exposure: DebugToolManager.m_enableDebugTools flipped from committed baseline false to true at line 30. This single-line change activates comprehensive debug tooling in Web builds that allows arbitrary SpinAck packet injection bypassing server validation. Attack surface: (1) Ctrl+Alt+U triggers file picker to upload .bin SpinAck, client decodes and stores in m_pendingSpinData, (2) next spin GameView dispatches GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA event consuming pending data instead of server response, (3) malicious actor can craft .bin with inflated TotalWin/RoundWin/arbitrary symbols to manipulate client display and potentially exploit downstream validation gaps. IsDebugEnvironment() gates on `!sys.isNative && this.m_enableDebugTools` meaning toggle affects Web/H5 builds (primary production deployment target for slot games). Committed baseline correctly sets false (feature disabled in prod), but current working tree would ship with debug door open if accidentally committed and deployed. Code comment line 29 "只在開發環境生效" is misleading—no build-time stripping exists, toggle is runtime check easily bypassed. ExposeToWindow() (currently commented line 57 but callable if uncommented) would add window.__EYESTRIKE_DEBUG__ making tools accessible from browser DevTools without keyboard shortcuts. This violates security principle: debug features should not exist in production artifacts, not merely "disabled by flag". Comparison with FeatureWheel Phase 5 security finding (test data in production code): that was MEDIUM (leaked implementation detail), this is HIGH (active exploit vector). Immediate remediation required before any commit/deploy: revert line 30 to `false`, add pre-commit hook checking `m_enableDebugTools.*true`, consider compile-time `#if DEBUG` macro or separate debug/release tsconfig excluding DebugToolManager.ts from release builds entirely.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>security</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>assets/Script/DebugToolManager.ts</file>
    <file>assets/Script/GameView.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Real server data includes col 0/5 in RespinLockedPos contradicting spec P-3 "只含 col1-4", uncommitted EXCLUDE fix prevents double-overlay</title>
  <subtitle>Round[0] sub0 has 16 locks: 8 col0/5 edge [0-3,20-23] + 8 col1-4 interior, committed code overlays static sprites on already-locked columns causing visual duplication</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>respin_and_freegame.json Round[0].PlateQueue[0].RespinLockedPos: [0,1,2,3,6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16,20,21,22,23] (16 positions)</fact>
    <fact>DecodeServerPosByRowConfig with ROW_CONFIG=[4,4,4,4,4,4]: pos 0-3 → col0 row0-3, pos 20-23 → col5 row0-3 (8 edge locks)</fact>
    <fact>Spec P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3 states "RespinLockedPos 只含 col1-4（中間四列）" contradicted by actual data</fact>
    <fact>Game_Define.ts:367 `RespinLockColumns = [0, 5]` defines edge columns mechanically locked via SetColumnLock(true)</fact>
    <fact>Committed EnterRespinState.ts f2f739e lines 94-108: iterates entire RespinLockedSet (含 col0/5) calling CreateSymbolStaticNode for all entries without filtering</fact>
    <fact>Uncommitted working tree adds EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true toggle line 30, guard line 104-109 skips col0/5 from EffectPlate static overlay</fact>
    <fact>SetColumnLock mechanism line 86-87: prevents reel rotation, original symbols persist naturally via framework, no EffectPlate overlay needed</fact>
    <fact>LeaveRespinState.AssertLockedConsistency line 66-87: compares RespinLockedSet (all 16) vs PlateQueue union (all 16), both include col0/5 so assertion remains valid</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Real server packet data resolves month-old spec vs implementation discrepancy: RespinLockedPos arrays include col 0/5 positions, directly contradicting P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3's documented assumption "只含 col1-4（中間四列）". Round[0] first plate contains 16 locks splitting 50/50: serverPos [0,1,2,3,20,21,22,23] decode to col0 rows 0-3 and col5 rows 0-3 via Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig (8 edge positions), while [6,8,9,10,13,14,15,16] decode to col1-4 middle area (8 interior locks). Committed code EnterRespinState.HandleReel f2f739e correctly MergeRespinLocks all 16 entries into accumulation set (line 97), then iterates entire set calling EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode for每個entry including col0/5 (lines 94-108). Problem: col 0/5 already mechanically locked via SetColumnLock(0/5, true) at lines 86-87—reels won't spin, original reel symbols naturally persist visible. Overlaying additional static sprites on top creates double-layer redundancy: (1) reel symbol frozen in place by framework, (2) identical EffectPlate static sprite layered on top. Potential visual artifacts: z-order conflicts if static sprite renders behind frozen reel (symbol disappears), or texture mismatch if reel cell updated but static sprite stale. Uncommitted working tree (current diff) adds fix: EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC constant line 30 defaults true, guard lines 104-109 `if(EXCLUDE && RespinLockColumns.includes(col)) return;` skips CreateSymbolStaticNode for edge columns. Design rationale documented in comment: "這兩列已由 SetColumnLock 整輪鎖定（reel 不轉、原符號自然留存），毋須 EffectPlate 再疊靜態張". MergeRespinLocks still accumulates all 16 positions (line 97 unchanged), maintaining data completeness for LeaveRespinState.AssertLockedConsistency which compares accumulated set keys vs PlateQueue union—both contain col0/5 so assertion logic remains sound. Toggle allows quick rollback to old behavior (`false` → overlay all entries) if SetColumnLock persistence proves insufficient in某些 framework edge case. Root cause: spec P-3 outdated, likely describes earlier protocol version or mistaken assumption during initial design. Fix direction correct but incomplete: (1) uncommitted working tree change must be committed to close visual bug, (2) spec §3.1 P-3 must update from "只含 col1-4" to "含 col0-5 整列，其中 col0/5 由 SetColumnLock 機械鎖定、col1-4 由 EffectPlate 靜態覆蓋", (3) runtime verification needed confirming col0/5 frozen symbols display correctly without static overlay across different device/browser/framework versions (屬 framework behavior dependency, spec §5.3-6 already flagged "實作時確認" for Respin visual correctness).</narrative>

content.thinking: Now document the ClearAll timing issue for the last Respin plate.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>SPIN.ClearAll() timing hazard: last Respin plate loses static overlays in MainGame, FreeGame immune via IsFreeGame guard</title>
  <subtitle>ENTER_RESPIN builds static sprites → SPIN.OnEnter clears via ReturnAll() → loop continues rebuilding each hand, but final plate cleared with no subsequent rebuild before LEAVE_RESPIN</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>SpinState.OnEnter line 34 calls m_gameView.ClearAll() every spin including Respin continuation hands</fact>
    <fact>GameView.ClearAll() line 1265-1268: `if(!IsFreeGame) m_effectPlate.ReturnAll();` — guard skips clearing in FreeGame</fact>
    <fact>EnterRespinState.HandleReel lines 99-122: iterates RespinLockedSet calling CreateSymbolStaticNode, rebuilds static display idempotently</fact>
    <fact>State flow for N-plate Respin: CHECK → ENTER_RESPIN (build statics) → SPIN (clear statics) → EFFECT_START → CHECK → loop until plate exhausted → LEAVE_RESPIN</fact>
    <fact>Last plate timing: ENTER_RESPIN builds statics for plate[N-1] → SPIN.ClearAll clears them → reel spins/stops → no subsequent ENTER_RESPIN to rebuild</fact>
    <fact>FreeGame immunity: ClearAll IsFreeGame guard prevents ReturnAll, static sprites survive entire FG Respin chain</fact>
    <fact>Spec P1-design-spec.md §5.3-6 notes "實作時確認" for Respin visual correctness, flagged as untested A-grade dependency</fact>
    <fact>Real data: Round[0] (MG) has 2 plates, Round[1/3/4/5/6/7/8/11/12/13] (FG) have multi-plate Respin chains up to 4 plates</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Code review reveals subtle timing hazard in Respin static display lifecycle affecting MainGame but not FreeGame. State machine flow: CHECK dispatches ENTER_RESPIN → HandleReel rebuilds static sprites for accumulated RespinLockedSet (lines 99-122, idempotent full-set reconstruction) → transitions to SPIN → SpinState.OnEnter line 34 immediately calls ClearAll() → line 1265 `if(!IsFreeGame)` condition passes for MG → calls m_effectPlate.ReturnAll() recycling all static sprites including鎖定覆蓋 just created. For middle plates in chain (plates 0 to N-2), next iteration's ENTER_RESPIN rebuilds static display before player sees停輪畫面, maintaining continuous visual presence of locked symbols. However last plate (index N-1) breaks pattern: ENTER_RESPIN builds statics → SPIN.ClearAll obliterates them → reel spins and stops → CHECK sees IsGoingToRespinGame=false (no more plates) → dispatches LEAVE_RESPIN → no subsequent ENTER_RESPIN occurs to rebuild. Result: during last plate's停輪畫面 period (from reel stop until LEAVE_RESPIN演出), col1-4 locked positions lack static sprite overlays—display depends entirely on whether framework's SlotReels happened to land correct locked symbol in that cell naturally. If server RespinLockedPos included position because that cell already contained target symbol (common Respin mechanic: lock matching symbols), reel stops on correct symbol anyway making missing overlay invisible. But if any mismatch or演出 timing causes reel cell content to differ from locked symbol, player sees wrong symbol briefly. FreeGame immune to this issue: ClearAll's IsFreeGame guard (line 1265) prevents ReturnAll call, static sprites persist throughout FG Respin chain including last plate. Asymmetric behavior between MG/FG not intentional design, artifact of pre-existing ClearAll logic predating Respin multi-plate refactor. Spec §5.3-6 already flagged Respin visual correctness as "實作時確認" A-grade untested dependency—this timing gap is具現 of that risk. Real server data confirms exposure: Round[0] (MainGame) has 2-plate Respin chain where plate[1] vulnerable, while 10 of 14 rounds are FreeGame with multi-plate Respin (safe due to guard). Three remediation options: (1) LEAVE_RESPIN.OnEnter rebuild static display once before演出 (symmetric with ENTER_RESPIN), (2) SPIN.ClearAll add `!IsRespinGame` guard parallel to `!IsFreeGame` (preserve statics during entire Respin lifecycle), (3) modify ReturnAll to exclude static sprites with某種 "persistent" tag set by EnterRespinState. Option (1) cleanest: LEAVE_RESPIN already has access to RespinLockedSet, single HandleReel-style rebuild before清盤演出 ensures last plate's停輪畫面 complete. Not blocking deployment (depends on whether reel naturally stops on correct symbols, framework behavior), but flagged MEDIUM severity requiring runtime validation with real 14-round packet before production release.</narrative>

    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>

content.thinking: Now document the real RoundQueue structure validation from the Node.js inspection.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>validation</type>
  <title>Real server packet structure validated: 14 rounds with multi-plate Respin in both MainGame and FreeGame, confirms dual-index design requirements</title>
  <subtitle>Round[0] MG has 2 plates triggering FG, Rounds 1-13 FG each have 1-4 plates, total 37 plates across 14 rounds—proves PlateQueue server commitment</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>respin_and_freegame.json RoundQueue length: 14 (parsed via Node.js JSON traversal)</fact>
    <fact>Round[0]: PlateQueue.length=2, FreeNowRound=0, IsFreeGame=undefined → MainGame with 2-plate Respin chain</fact>
    <fact>Round[1-13]: FreeNowRound increments 1→13, all FreeGame rounds with varying PlateQueue lengths</fact>
    <fact>PlateQueue distribution: 1-plate rounds (3 rounds), 2-plate (2 rounds), 3-plate (4 rounds), 4-plate (5 rounds) — confirms server generates variable-length chains</fact>
    <fact>Total plates across 14 rounds: 2+3+1+4+4+3+3+4+3+1+1+4+2+2 = 37 individual PlateInfo packets</fact>
    <fact>Round[0] triggers FG via NextFeverGameType=1 (MG Respin → FeatureWheel → FG transition旗艦場景)</fact>
    <fact>Every round with PlateQueue.length>1 represents Respin chain requiring CurSubPlateIndex iteration</fact>
    <fact>Protocol V-2 invariant confirmed: each PlateInfo has individual Win field, RoundWin aggregates full PlateQueue</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Real server packet deep inspection via Node.js JSON parsing validates all protocol assumptions underpinning dual-index refactor. RoundQueue contains 14 total rounds: Round[0] is MainGame (FreeNowRound=0, IsFreeGame absent) with 2-plate Respin sequence, Rounds 1-13 are FreeGame progression (FreeNowRound=1→13) each containing own Respin chains of 1 to 4 plates. This structure proves: (1) server committed to multi-plate protocol—not single-plate with placeholder arrays, every PlateInfo is distinct data packet with unique PlateSymbol/Win/RespinLockedPos, (2) Respin occurs in both MainGame and FreeGame contexts, requiring IsRespinGame flag and IsGoingToRespinGame getter to work across game modes, (3) variable PlateQueue lengths (1-4) necessitate robust boundary handling in AdvancePlateCursorPure and IsGoingToRespinPure tested by RespinPlateLogic.test.ts, (4) 37 total plates means any演出 reading "PlateQueue[0]" assuming single-plate would misrender 24 of 37 hands. Round[0]'s 2-plate chain demonstrates旗艦場景: plate[0] locks positions and triggers NextFeverGameType=1 (FeatureWheel → FG), plate[1] has empty RespinLockedPos marking Respin exhaustion, entire sequence must complete before LEAVE_RESPIN sees IsGoingToFree=true dispatching ENTER_FREE per LeaveRespinState three-branch logic. FreeGame rounds showcase Respin density: Round[3/4/7/11] each have 4-plate chains (4 consecutive ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN loops before LEAVE_RESPIN), exercising cursor advancement/accumulation/idempotent rebuild patterns extensively. Protocol V-2 trait visible: cannot pre-sum RoundWin at round start because composed of plate-by-plate wins—AwardState.CalculateAccumulatedWin correctly iterates completed rounds' RoundWin plus current round's per-plate Win up to CurSubPlateIndex (lines documenting this in prior observation). Structure confirms B-4 unshow assumption partially: server does provide complete PlateQueue for multi-plate rounds (not truncated), validating UnshowPrepareState's "從 plate 0 重播整局" strategy—cursor set to (UnshowStartRound, 0) and flow naturally re-enters ENTER_RESPIN advancing through plates. Only remaining unshow unknown: whether server UnshowStartRound points to correct round index when disconnecting mid-Respin (client would resume from that round's plate 0, not mid-plate), flagged BC-8 for post-deployment testing. This validation closes design-phase uncertainty: real data exhibits all edge cases spec anticipated (MG Respin, FG Respin, variable lengths, FG triggers, multi-round sequences), making dual-index refactor not speculative架空 design but direct映射 of deployed server protocol.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>status</type>
  <title>Working tree has 3 uncommitted changes: 1 CRITICAL security revert needed, 1 必要 visual fix, 1 work-in-progress comment deletion</title>
  <subtitle>DebugToolManager toggle flip must revert to false before any commit; EnterRespinState EXCLUDE fix should commit immediately; RespinUIManager comment deletion appears incidental</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Git diff HEAD shows 3 files modified: DebugToolManager.ts (+1-1), EnterRespinState.ts (+17-2), RespinUIManager.ts (-3 lines comment)</fact>
    <fact>DebugToolManager.ts line 30: `m_enableDebugTools: boolean = true` changed from committed `false` — CRITICAL security exposure</fact>
    <fact>EnterRespinState.ts adds EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC toggle (lines 25-30) + guard (lines 104-109) + updates comment line 79 "含 col 0/5" correcting spec</fact>
    <fact>RespinUIManager.ts: deleted 3 comment lines (git diff shows -3 insertions), likely accidental cleanup during file navigation</fact>
    <fact>Most recent commits: 81f1f76 (multiplier refactor), f2f739e (Respin dual-index), both authored 2026-06-11 same day as current work</fact>
    <fact>Tests passing: 30/30 assertions in RespinPlateLogic.test.ts cover BC-1/2/3, no test changes needed for uncommitted EnterRespinState fix</fact>
    <fact>EXCLUDE toggle default true means committed version (without toggle) has col 0/5 double-overlay bug in production</fact>
    <fact>Spec P1-design-spec.md still contains outdated P-3 "只含 col1-4" not yet corrected to match real data "含 col0/5"</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Working tree state analysis reveals three distinct uncommitted changes with different urgency levels requiring separate disposition. **CRITICAL priority**: DebugToolManager.ts m_enableDebugTools flip from false→true at line 30 is HIGH-severity security vulnerability enabling packet injection tools in Web builds—must revert to false immediately before any commit or risk accidental production deployment of debug backdoor. This change likely exploratory toggle during local testing with respin_and_freegame.json packet upload, forgotten in working tree. **High priority commit needed**: EnterRespinState.ts EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC addition (+17 lines total) fixes real visual bug where committed f2f739e code overlays redundant static sprites on col 0/5 already mechanically locked by SetColumnLock. Toggle correctly defaults true, guard cleanly skips EffectPlate.CreateSymbolStaticNode for edge columns (lines 104-109), comment update line 79 corrects outdated "只含 col1-4" assumption to match real server behavior "含 col 0/5". This fix should commit as immediate follow-up to f2f739e with message "fix(respin): skip static overlay for col0/5 locked by SetColumnLock, update RespinLockedPos comment to reflect actual server data including edge columns". No test changes needed—BC-3 already validates ResolveLockedEntries decoding logic covering col 0/5 positions, visual overlay skip is framework-dependent演出 not unit-testable. **Low priority**: RespinUIManager.ts -3 comment lines appears incidental, likely deleted during code reading/navigation in editor. Should review actual diff content: if substantive code changed, needs scrutiny; if only comment whitespace cleanup, can include in next commit or discard. Current committed baseline f2f739e already has col 0/5 visual duplication bug in production—uncommitted fix present but not deployed means any runtime testing of f2f739e will exhibit double-overlay on edge columns. Recommendation: (1) `git diff DebugToolManager.ts` → manually revert line 30 to `false` or `git checkout HEAD -- assets/Script/DebugToolManager.ts`, (2) stage EnterRespinState.ts + commit with fix message, (3) update P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3 from "只含 col1-4" to "含 col0-5（其中 col0/5 由 SetColumnLock 機械鎖定 + RespinLockColumns 定義）", (4) review RespinUIManager diff and discard if trivial. Post-commit validation: grep `m_enableDebugTools.*=.*true` should return zero matches in tracked files (only test/fixture contexts acceptable), runtime test with respin_and_freegame.json confirming col 0/5 display correctly without static overlay.</narrative>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\assets\\\\Script\\\\Respin\\\\RespinPlateLogic.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * @ch Respin 雙層索引純邏輯層（零 cc 依賴，可在 Node 跑）\\n *\\n * 為什麼獨立成檔：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有自動化測試手段，\\n * 把可測的判斷（游標推進 / 旗標投影 / 鎖定位置解碼）收進零依賴模組，\\n * 是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置（對應 BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n *\\n * 設計原則：常數與解碼器一律由呼叫端「參數注入」，本模組不 import 任何\\n * Cocos / Game_Define / Common，保持純函式可測。\\n */\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 雙層游標推進\\n *\\n * 規則：當前 round 內還有未播 plate（sub < plateCount-1）→ 只推 sub、round 不動；\\n *       否則（當前 round 的 plate 已播完）→ round+1、sub 歸 0。\\n *\\n * 邊界：呼叫端在 round 無效（如 -1，剛 Reset）時傳 plateCount=0，\\n *       則 0 < 0-1 不成立 → 走換局分支 round+1=0、sub=0（從 idle 進第一局）。\\n *\\n * @param round      當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局（round 對應）的 PlateQueue.length；取不到傳 0\\n */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(\\n    round: number,\\n    sub: number,\\n    plateCount: number\\n): { round: number; sub: number }\\n{\\n    if ( sub < plateCount - 1 )\\n    {\\n        return { round, sub: sub + 1 };\\n    }\\n    return { round: round + 1, sub: 0 };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToFree 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：目前在 MainGame 局（round===0）且整包有多個 RoundInfo（觸發 FG）且尚未進 FG。\\n * FG 進行中（isFreeGame=true）或非首局（round≠0）或單局（len≤1）皆為 false。\\n *\\n * @param round         當前局索引（CurPlateIndex）\\n * @param roundQueueLen SpinAck.RoundQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n * @param isFreeGame    GameView.IsFreeGame\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(\\n    round: number,\\n    roundQueueLen: number,\\n    isFreeGame: boolean\\n): boolean\\n{\\n    return round === 0 && roundQueueLen > 1 && !isFreeGame;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch IsGoingToRespinGame 投影\\n *\\n * 語意：當前 round 還有未播的 plate（sub 後面還有），即該局觸發了 Respin 且尚未播完。\\n * plateCount ≤ 0 或缺值（呼叫端傳 0）→ 恆 false；單 plate（plateCount=1）→ false。\\n *\\n * @param sub        當前局內 plate 索引（CurSubPlateIndex）\\n * @param plateCount 當前局 PlateQueue.length（缺值傳 0）\\n */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure( sub: number, plateCount: number ): boolean\\n{\\n    return sub < plateCount - 1;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch ResolveLockedEntries 回傳的單筆鎖定位置 */\\nexport interface LockedEntry\\n{\\n    serverPos: number;\\n    col: number;\\n    row: number;\\n    symbol: number;\\n    number: number;\\n}\\n\\n/** @ch 盤面符號最小結構（對應 CColumn[]，僅取本模組需要的欄位） */\\ntype PlateSymbolLike = ReadonlyArray<{\\n    Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number; Number?: number } | null | undefined> | null;\\n} | null | undefined>;\\n\\n/**\\n * @ch 將 server 給定的鎖定位置（serverPos[]）解碼為可顯示的 entry\\n *\\n * 注意：位置「由 server 給定」（PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos），本函式不掃描盤面找 Cash/Mystery，\\n * 只負責「解碼 serverPos → col/row」並「從 plateSymbol 取出該格的 symbol/number」供演出用。\\n *\\n * fail-loud 邊界：解碼失敗 / col 缺 / cell 缺 → 跳過該筆並記入 warnings（呼叫端 console.warn），\\n *                 不 throw（不炸狀態機）也不靜默。Number 缺值回 -1。\\n *\\n * @param plateSymbol     當前 plate 的 PlateSymbol（CColumn[]）\\n * @param serverPositions PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos（serverPos 陣列）\\n * @param decodePos       注入的解碼器（呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig）\\n */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: PlateSymbolLike | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number> | null | undefined,\\n    decodePos: ( serverPos: number ) => { col: number; row: number } | null\\n): { entries: LockedEntry[]; warnings: string[] }\\n{\\n    const entries: LockedEntry[] = [];\\n    const warnings: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if ( !serverPositions || serverPositions.length === 0 )\\n    {\\n        return { entries, warnings };\\n    }\\n\\n    for ( const serverPos of serverPositions )\\n    {\\n        const decoded = decodePos( serverPos );\\n        if ( !decoded )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `無法解碼 RespinLockedPos serverPos=${serverPos}` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const { col, row } = decoded;\\n        const colData = plateSymbol?.[ col ]?.Col;\\n        if ( !colData )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺 col=${col}（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        const cell = colData[ row ];\\n        if ( !cell )\\n        {\\n            warnings.push( `plateSymbol 缺格子 (col=${col},row=${row})（serverPos=${serverPos}）` );\\n            continue;\\n        }\\n\\n        entries.push( {\\n            serverPos,\\n            col,\\n            row,\\n            symbol: cell.Symbol ?? -1,\\n            number: cell.Number ?? -1,\\n        } );\\n    }\\n\\n    return { entries, warnings };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":148,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":148}}"</outcome>

被提交。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.9（扣 0.1 給「是否真上線」之環境前提，屬無法從碼證實的 B 級）。\\n\\n> 註：另有一筆獨立評估同一行的 medium finding，skeptic 把實際 blast radius 評為更低（component 未 wired 至任何 scene + native gated，onLoad 不會執行），認為 severity 應為 low。兩份 verdict 在「未追蹤旗標翻轉不應隨重構進 commit」這點一致；嚴重度分歧見下方「嚴重度註記」。**保守起見以 high 列為必修的 commit-gate（還原或排除此行），實際漏洞觸發前提取決於該 component 是否被掛載。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (2) Medium findings（建議 / 用戶決策）\\n\\n### R-2 [correctness][medium] 設計規格 P-3 前提（RespinLockedPos「只含 col1-4」）與真實回包牴觸；col0/5 在已 commit 版本會疊冗餘靜態張\\n\\n- **位置**：`.claude_temp/respin_and_freegame.json` vs `P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3`（:82 / :233）/ `EnterRespinState.ts:84-122`\\n- **問題**：規格 P-3 假設 `RespinLockedPos` 只含 col1-4，但真實回包逐筆解碼證實 col0/5 也在內（Round0 sub0=[0,1,2,3,...,20,21,22,23]，其中 0-3=col0、20-23=col5，整列 8 格全鎖；`LEGACY_PLATE_LAYOUT=false → ROW_CONFIG=[4,4,4,4,4,4]`，decode 算術吻合）。已 commit 的 `EnterRespinState.HandleReel`（f2f739e）仍把全部 entry（含 col0/5）merge 進 `m_respinLockedSet` 並對全集合重建靜態圖；col0/5 既由 `SetColumnLock` 整列鎖定、又被 EffectPlate 疊靜態張 → 視覺上雙重鎖定 / 可能蓋圖錯亂。\\n- **關係**：這正是未 commit 的 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true` 要修的問題。該開關方向正確（只跳過 col0/5 的靜態張重建、不過濾 merge），且 `expected 聯集` 與 `actual merge` 兩邊都含 col0/5 故斷言仍一致。但修正停在 working tree 未提交。\\n- **修正**：\\n  1. 盡快提交 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC` 修正；\\n  2. 更正 spec §3.1 P-3「只含 col1-4」為「含 col0/5 整列」，避免後續維護者依錯誤前提；\\n  3. 執行期確認 col0/5 跳過靜態張後、停輪畫面仍正確顯示鎖定符號（依賴 `SetColumnLock` 讓 reel 留存原符號，屬 framework 行為）。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.85。次要瑕疵：finding 引用的 `AssertLockedConsistency` 命名在 GameView 不存在（規格 §5.7 稱 fail-loud 斷言）；「蓋圖錯亂」屬部分推論（已標註需執行期確認）。不影響核心矛盾與冗餘疊圖事實。\\n\\n### R-3 [repro+quality][medium] 本次 working tree 混入無關的除錯旗標翻轉（commit 衛生）\\n\\n- **位置**：`assets/Script/DebugToolManager.ts:30`\\n- **問題**：與 R-1 同一行，但從 commit 紀律視角看：此未追蹤變更與 Respin 雙層重構無關，卻會混入同一次 commit。屬本次審查範圍內（git status 標 M）。\\n- **修正**：提交前還原 `false`，或明確排除此檔不進 commit；本機除錯需要則留 working tree 不 staged。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.6。**重要修正**：skeptic 查證實際 blast radius 近乎零——該 Component（uuid acb4b085-…）在 `Edit.scene`/`MainGame.scene` 皆 grep 不到、repo 無 `.fire`、無動態 `addComponent`，未掛在任何 node → `onLoad` 不執行 → 即使 flag=true 除錯工具實際不會啟用；且另有 `!sys.isNative` 閘門。finding 描述的「測試鍵 E/Q/R 改盤面/觸發乘倍」與本檔不符（本檔為 Ctrl+Alt+D/U/P）。∴ 「會在 build 啟用除錯工具」的衝擊論述被高估，**實際應為 low**；但「未追蹤旗標翻轉不該隨重構進同一 commit」的紀律問題為真。\\n\\n### R-4 [repro+quality][medium] HandleRespinGame() 成為本次改動造成的 orphan，違反 §10.5 死碼立場\\n\\n- **位置**：`assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts:241-256`（HandleRespinGame），呼叫點刪於 :99-103\\n- **問題**：本次改動（f2f739e）刪除唯一呼叫點 `if(IsRespinGame) HandleRespinGame()`，使該 private 方法成為 0 呼叫者 orphan（grep 全 assets/Script 確認；tsc 0 錯誤但 TS 不報 unused private 故靜默存活）。屬「你的改動造成的 orphan」（§10.5 第一條 → 應刪），非既存死碼。作者以註解「暫留供 BC-8 實測接線」保留。\\n- **決定性反證**：binding 設計規格已兩處明確裁定刪除——§5.7:253「刪 :89-93 死碼分支（用戶確認）；其 HandleRespinGame 鎖列呼叫一併消失若 orphan」、因果鏈:365「呼叫者歸 0 → 一併刪（本改動造成的 orphan）」。規格（含用戶確認）判定刪除，實作卻保留，屬對已確認規格 + §10.5 的雙重偏離；BC-8 註解只是把保留理由寫進碼，不等於 §10.5 允許的處置，且無 artifact 記錄此保留為用戶確認的刻意偏離。\\n- **修正**：依 §10.5 刪除方法本體（BC-8 上線時從 git 還原）；或若團隊確認 unshow Respin 恢復路徑近期必接線，則在追溯中明確標記為「暫緩刪除的本次 orphan」並取得用戶確認，不要靜默保留。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.8。caveat：政策/可維護性 finding 而非 runtime bug；「為近期將接線的功能留有文檔 stub」是部分團隊可接受的工程判斷，故 medium 偏高、評 low 亦合理。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (3) Low findings（摘要，未經對抗驗證）\\n\\n- **[correctness] RoundEndState.ts:41-46（commit 81f1f76）**：`ResetMultiplierToBase()` 與 `CheckAndPlayActivateEffectEnd()` 兩個 round-end 呼叫整段被註解 → 跨局倍率不再歸零。與 Respin 重構正交，可能是非預期回歸。確認停用是否刻意，否則恢復或補註解說明倍率重置改由何處負責。\\n- **[correctness] UnshowPrepareState.ts:241-256**：與 R-4 同一 orphan，從「已加 ⚠️ BC-8 註解的 documented 例外」視角記一筆待清理；待 BC-8 unshow Respin 實測後恢復呼叫或刪除。\\n- **[correctness] GameView.ts:556-563 + RoundEndState.ts:32 / ResetPlateCursor**：`m_isRespinGame` 僅 EnterRespinState:48 設 true、LeaveRespinState:30 清 false；`ResetPlateCursor()` 清 cursor 與 lockedSet 但不清 `m_isRespinGame`。Respin 局中途異常中止（斷線非經 LEAVE_RESPIN 重入）可能殘留 true。pre-existing 行為，非本次新引入。建議 `ResetPlateCursor()` 一併重設 `m_isRespinGame=false` 作兜底。\\n- **[security] package.json / proto 套件（bab1dbd~2..HEAD）**：本次 diff 連帶升 `uk_872_eyestrike2_proto`（`SpinAck.decode` 反序列化邊界，攻擊面相鄰）。未做供應鏈/反序列化健全性審查。確認版本 bump 為受控來源、只動 RespinLockedPos 欄位位置無其他結構破壞。流程性確認，無立即漏洞證據。\\n- **[repro+quality] GameView.ts:911-914 ForEndToNext()**：v2 骨架下 `else if(IsRespinGame)→SPIN` 分支不可達（ROUND_END 只在 LEAVE_RESPIN 清旗標後進入）。spec §9 取捨⑤已知並選擇不刪。建議加註「v2 下不可達，保留為斷線/未知流程防禦」。\\n- **[repro+quality] ScatterShowState.ts:363-385 / EnterFreeState.ts:269 / RoundEndState.ts:35-41 / SlotReels.ts:1613（commit 81f1f76）**：多處 `MULTIPLIER_EVENT` 派發被註解（乘倍系統重做 WIP）。副作用：ScatterShowState 的 `currentMultiplier` 恆為 0 → `if(currentMultiplier>1)` 整段變死碼、`PlayMultiplierFlyAnimation` 剩空殼。非 Respin 重構引入，建議分離追蹤並補註解避免後續 review 反覆翻案。\\n- **[repro+quality] EnterRespinState.ts:26 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC + LeaveRespinState.ts:66 AssertLockedConsistency**：真實回包證實 col0/5 在 RespinLockedPos，`EXCLUDE...=true` 處理正確、斷言兩邊都含 col0/5 故不誤報（14 局已逐局驗證無 overlap、末手聯集==累積集合）。正確性已通過的標註，非缺陷；風險僅在 server 未來若改口徑（不再每 plate 重發 col0/5）斷言會誤報。建議補註解記錄 spec P-3 與真實資料牴觸。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (4) 誤報記錄（記錄不修）\\n\\n### [correctness][誤報] SPIN.OnEnter ClearAll → ReturnAll 回收鎖定靜態張，致 MG 最後一手缺鎖定符號\\n\\n- **位置**：`SpinState.ts:34 (ClearAll)` + `EnterRespinState.ts:99-122`\\n- **誤報原因**（skeptic confidence 0.85）：核心因果鏈被程式碼否證。鎖定靜態張存於 `m_symbolStaticNodes`（EffectPlate.ts:105/609）；`ClearAll → ReturnAll`（!IsFreeGame 時）內層只呼叫 `CleanSymbolAnim`，後者只清 `m_symbolSpines` / `m_symbolAddEffectSpines`，**完全不觸碰 `m_symbolStaticNodes`**。靜態張回收是獨立的 `CleanSymbolStatic`，呼叫點僅 `CreateSymbolStaticNode`（冪等覆蓋）與 public `CleanSymbolStaticNode`（僅 ScatterShowState:100），ReturnAll 不在其中。\\n- ∴「最後一手 SPIN 清掉鎖定靜態圖且不再重建」前提不成立；其衍生的「MG/FG 行為差異」也瓦解（ReturnAll 兩情境都不碰靜態張）。時序部分（最後一手後接 LEAVE_RESPIN）描述正確，但前提錯誤使結論失效。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (5) 整體 verdict：**fix-required**\\n\\n判定依據：\\n- 存在 1 筆 high（R-1）必修的 commit-gate / 安全閘門問題（除錯旗標翻轉，最壞情形可被玩家偽造展示盤面 + 外洩封包；最好情形 component 未掛載則無實際觸發，但無論如何不該隨重構 commit）。\\n- R-2 揭露 spec 前提（P-3）與真實回包牴觸，且正確修正停在 working tree 未提交——已 commit 的 f2f739e 在 col0/5 會疊冗餘靜態張。\\n- R-4 為對「已用戶確認的刪除規格」+ §10.5 的雙重偏離。\\n\\n**放行條件（建議完成後再 commit/上線）**：\\n1. 處理 R-1：還原 `DebugToolManager.ts:30` 為 false（或改 build-define 閘門 / 排除此檔），這是上線前 hard gate。\\n2. 處理 R-2：提交 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC` 修正 + 更正 spec P-3 註解。\\n3. 處理 R-4：依規格刪除 orphan，或明確記錄為已確認的暫緩例外。\\n4. R-3 與 R-1 同源，隨 R-1 一併解。\\n\\n誠實邊界：R-1 的最壞情形依賴「DebugToolManager component 實際被掛載且為 web build」——此前提未從碼證實（兩 skeptic 對是否掛載結論相左）。若確認永不掛載，R-1 實際嚴重度降為 commit 衛生（同 R-3）。無論掛載與否，commit 前還原該行皆為正確處置。\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[],\"originalFile\":null,\"userModified\":false}"</outcome>
