`P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3`（:82 / :233）/ `EnterRespinState.ts:84-122`\\n- **問題**：規格 P-3 假設 `RespinLockedPos` 只含 col1-4，但真實回包逐筆解碼證實 col0/5 也在內（Round0 sub0=[0,1,2,3,...,20,21,22,23]，其中 0-3=col0、20-23=col5，整列 8 格全鎖；`LEGACY_PLATE_LAYOUT=false → ROW_CONFIG=[4,4,4,4,4,4]`，decode 算術吻合）。已 commit 的 `EnterRespinState.HandleReel`（f2f739e）仍把全部 entry（含 col0/5）merge 進 `m_respinLockedSet` 並對全集合重建靜態圖；col0/5 既由 `SetColumnLock` 整列鎖定、又被 EffectPlate 疊靜態張 → 視覺上雙重鎖定 / 可能蓋圖錯亂。\\n- **關係**：這正是未 commit 的 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true` 要修的問題。該開關方向正確（只跳過 col0/5 的靜態張重建、不過濾 merge），且 `expected 聯集` 與 `actual merge` 兩邊都含 col0/5 故斷言仍一致。但修正停在 working tree 未提交。\\n- **修正**：\\n  1. 盡快提交 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC` 修正；\\n  2. 更正 spec §3.1 P-3「只含 col1-4」為「含 col0/5 整列」，避免後續維護者依錯誤前提；\\n  3. 執行期確認 col0/5 跳過靜態張後、停輪畫面仍正確顯示鎖定符號（依賴 `SetColumnLock` 讓 reel 留存原符號，屬 framework 行為）。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.85。次要瑕疵：finding 引用的 `AssertLockedConsistency` 命名在 GameView 不存在（規格 §5.7 稱 fail-loud 斷言）；「蓋圖錯亂」屬部分推論（已標註需執行期確認）。不影響核心矛盾與冗餘疊圖事實。\\n\\n### R-3 [repro+quality][medium] 本次 working tree 混入無關的除錯旗標翻轉（commit 衛生）\\n\\n- **位置**：`assets/Script/DebugToolManager.ts:30`\\n- **問題**：與 R-1 同一行，但從 commit 紀律視角看：此未追蹤變更與 Respin 雙層重構無關，卻會混入同一次 commit。屬本次審查範圍內（git status 標 M）。\\n- **修正**：提交前還原 `false`，或明確排除此檔不進 commit；本機除錯需要則留 working tree 不 staged。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.6。**重要修正**：skeptic 查證實際 blast radius 近乎零——該 Component（uuid acb4b085-…）在 `Edit.scene`/`MainGame.scene` 皆 grep 不到、repo 無 `.fire`、無動態 `addComponent`，未掛在任何 node → `onLoad` 不執行 → 即使 flag=true 除錯工具實際不會啟用；且另有 `!sys.isNative` 閘門。finding 描述的「測試鍵 E/Q/R 改盤面/觸發乘倍」與本檔不符（本檔為 Ctrl+Alt+D/U/P）。∴ 「會在 build 啟用除錯工具」的衝擊論述被高估，**實際應為 low**；但「未追蹤旗標翻轉不該隨重構進同一 commit」的紀律問題為真。\\n\\n### R-4 [repro+quality][medium] HandleRespinGame() 成為本次改動造成的 orphan，違反 §10.5 死碼立場\\n\\n- **位置**：`assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts:241-256`（HandleRespinGame），呼叫點刪於 :99-103\\n- **問題**：本次改動（f2f739e）刪除唯一呼叫點 `if(IsRespinGame) HandleRespinGame()`，使該 private 方法成為 0 呼叫者 orphan（grep 全 assets/Script 確認；tsc 0 錯誤但 TS 不報 unused private 故靜默存活）。屬「你的改動造成的 orphan」（§10.5 第一條 → 應刪），非既存死碼。作者以註解「暫留供 BC-8 實測接線」保留。\\n- **決定性反證**：binding 設計規格已兩處明確裁定刪除——§5.7:253「刪 :89-93 死碼分支（用戶確認）；其 HandleRespinGame 鎖列呼叫一併消失若 orphan」、因果鏈:365「呼叫者歸 0 → 一併刪（本改動造成的 orphan）」。規格（含用戶確認）判定刪除，實作卻保留，屬對已確認規格 + §10.5 的雙重偏離；BC-8 註解只是把保留理由寫進碼，不等於 §10.5 允許的處置，且無 artifact 記錄此保留為用戶確認的刻意偏離。\\n- **修正**：依 §10.5 刪除方法本體（BC-8 上線時從 git 還原）；或若團隊確認 unshow Respin 恢復路徑近期必接線，則在追溯中明確標記為「暫緩刪除的本次 orphan」並取得用戶確認，不要靜默保留。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.8。caveat：政策/可維護性 finding 而非 runtime bug；「為近期將接線的功能留有文檔 stub」是部分團隊可接受的工程判斷，故 medium 偏高、評 low 亦合理。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (3) Low findings（摘要，未經對抗驗證）\\n\\n- **[correctness] RoundEndState.ts:41-46（commit 81f1f76）**：`ResetMultiplierToBase()` 與 註解的 documented 例外」視角記一筆待清理；待 BC-8 unshow Respin 實測後恢復呼叫或刪除。\\n- **[correctness] GameView.ts:556-563 + RoundEndState.ts:32 / ResetPlateCursor**：`m_isRespinGame` 僅 EnterRespinState:48 設 true、LeaveRespinState:30 清 false；`ResetPlateCursor()` 清 cursor 與 lockedSet 但不清 `m_isRespinGame`。Respin 局中途異常中止（斷線非經 LEAVE_RESPIN 重入）可能殘留 true。pre-existing 行為，非本次新引入。建議 `ResetPlateCursor()` 一併重設 `m_isRespinGame=false` 作兜底。\\n- **[security] package.json / proto 套件（bab1dbd~2..HEAD）**：本次 diff 連帶升 `uk_872_eyestrike2_proto`（`SpinAck.decode` 反序列化邊界，攻擊面相鄰）。未做供應鏈/反序列化健全性審查。確認版本 bump 為受控來源、只動 RespinLockedPos 欄位位置無其他結構破壞。流程性確認，無立即漏洞證據。\\n- **[repro+quality] GameView.ts:911-914 ForEndToNext()**：v2 骨架下 `else if(IsRespinGame)→SPIN` 分支不可達（ROUND_END 只在 LEAVE_RESPIN 清旗標後進入）。spec §9 取捨⑤已知並選擇不刪。建議加註「v2 下不可達，保留為斷線/未知流程防禦」。\\n- **[repro+quality] ScatterShowState.ts:363-385 / EnterFreeState.ts:269 / RoundEndState.ts:35-41 / SlotReels.ts:1613（commit 81f1f76）**：多處 `MULTIPLIER_EVENT` 派發被註解（乘倍系統重做 WIP）。副作用：ScatterShowState 的 `currentMultiplier` 恆為 0 → `if(currentMultiplier>1)` 整段變死碼、`PlayMultiplierFlyAnimation` 剩空殼。非 Respin 重構引入，建議分離追蹤並補註解避免後續 review 反覆翻案。\\n- **[repro+quality] EnterRespinState.ts:26 EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC + LeaveRespinState.ts:66 AssertLockedConsistency**：真實回包證實 col0/5 在 RespinLockedPos，`EXCLUDE...=true` 處理正確、斷言兩邊都含 col0/5 故不誤報（14 局已逐局驗證無 overlap、末手聯集==累積集合）。正確性已通過的標註，非缺陷；風險僅在 server 未來若改口徑（不再每 plate 重發 col0/5）斷言會誤報。建議補註解記錄 spec P-3 與真實資料牴觸。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (4) 誤報記錄（記錄不修）\\n\\n### [correctness][誤報] SPIN.OnEnter ClearAll → ReturnAll 回收鎖定靜態張，致 MG 最後一手缺鎖定符號\\n\\n- **位置**：`SpinState.ts:34 (ClearAll)` + `EnterRespinState.ts:99-122`\\n- **誤報原因**（skeptic confidence 0.85）：核心因果鏈被程式碼否證。鎖定靜態張存於 `m_symbolStaticNodes`（EffectPlate.ts:105/609）；`ClearAll → ReturnAll`（!IsFreeGame 時）內層只呼叫 `CleanSymbolAnim`，後者只清 `m_symbolSpines` / `m_symbolAddEffectSpines`，**完全不觸碰 `m_symbolStaticNodes`**。靜態張回收是獨立的 `CleanSymbolStatic`，呼叫點僅 `CreateSymbolStaticNode`（冪等覆蓋）與 public `CleanSymbolStaticNode`（僅 ScatterShowState:100），ReturnAll 不在其中。\\n- ∴「最後一手 SPIN 清掉鎖定靜態圖且不再重建」前提不成立；其衍生的「MG/FG 行為差異」也瓦解（ReturnAll 兩情境都不碰靜態張）。時序部分（最後一手後接 LEAVE_RESPIN）描述正確，但前提錯誤使結論失效。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (5) 整體 verdict：**fix-required**\\n\\n判定依據：\\n- 存在 1 筆 high（R-1）必修的 commit-gate / 安全閘門問題（除錯旗標翻轉，最壞情形可被玩家偽造展示盤面 + 外洩封包；最好情形   <narrative>Code review phase completed producing comprehensive P3-review.md artifact documenting all validated quality/security findings blocking Respin dual-index refactor deployment. Review used three-phase methodology: (1) parallel multi-lens scan generating raw findings from correctness/security/repro+quality perspectives, (2) independent skeptic agent adversarially validating each finding via isReal/confidence scoring attempting to refute via code inspection, (3) filtering only skeptic-validated findings into final report. HIGH severity gate-keeper R-1 discovered: DebugToolManager.m_enableDebugTools toggled true in uncommitted working tree, removing sole runtime guard for debug tools allowing Ctrl+Alt+U upload of .bin SpinAck files decoded via protocol.ar2es2Proto.SpinAck.decode, stored in m_pendingSpinData, then injected into GameView via GET_PENDING_SPIN_DATA event callback replacing genuine server response—enables player fabrication of arbitrary reels/wins/FG/Respin sequences for client display. While final settlement server-authoritative (no direct金流 theft), creates integrity/authorization gap for screenshot fraud/social engineering, and critically: change混在 Respin working tree extremely易誤commit alongside legitimate refactor. Skeptic validated confidence 0.9 (chain literal verified end-to-end), though noted component UUID grep=0 in scenes suggests possible non-wiring mitigating actual trigger (second skeptic评 low on this basis), but commit hygiene demands revert regardless. MEDIUM R-2 reveals spec-vs-reality conflict: design document P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3 assumes "RespinLockedPos只含col1-4" based on early understanding, but real 14-round packet逐筆解碼 proves serverPos arrays include col 0/5 edge columns (Round[0] sub0 has 16 locks: 8 in col0/5 range [0-3,20-21,22,23] + 8 in col1-4 interior, confirmed via DecodeServerPosByRowConfig with ROW_CONFIG=[4,4,4,4,4,4]). Committed f2f739e EnterRespinState.HandleReel merges all 16 into RespinLockedSet then iterates calling CreateSymbolStaticNode for每個entry including col0/5—but col0/5 already mechanically locked via SetColumnLock (reels won't spin, symbols naturally persist), overlaying additional static sprite creates visual duplication/potential z-order conflicts. Fix exists: EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC toggle in working tree skips static overlay for edge columns (lines 104-109 guard), but uncommitted leaving deployed version with redundancy. MEDIUM R-4 documents process violation: UnshowPrepareState.HandleRespinGame orphaned by deleting唯一呼叫點 at lines 99-103 (grep confirms 0 callers, tsc silent on unused private), constitutes "your change造成 orphan" triggering CLAUDE.md §10.5 mandatory deletion, yet author preserved with "⚠️BC-8暫緩刪除" comment—directly contradicts binding spec P1-design-spec.md §5.7:253 / §因果鏈:365 which explicitly instructs deletion with user confirmation. Preservation documented but lacks artifact tracking as approved exception, violates both coding standard and confirmed design decision. One major finding invalidated post-skeptic: initial "SPIN.OnEnter ClearAll→ReturnAll recycles ENTER_RESPIN static sprites leaving last plate without locked symbol overlays" refuted via EffectPlate.ts code inspection—ClearAll calls ReturnAll which calls CleanSymbolAnim (line 448), CleanSymbolAnim only touches m_symbolSpines/m_symbolAddEffectSpines arrays (lines 228-250), completely avoids m_symbolStaticNodes where static sprites stored; actual static cleanup via separate CleanSymbolStatic method (line 254) only called from CreateSymbolStaticNode (idempotent overwrite) and explicit CleanSymbolStaticNode (ScatterShowState:100), ReturnAll never in callchain. Timing description (last plate→LEAVE_RESPIN not ENTER_RESPIN) accurate but causal premise false, invalidating conclusion. Final verdict: fix-required with 4-point放行條件 before commit/deploy: (1) revert DebugToolManager.ts:30 to false or exclude from commit (hard gate), (2) commit EXCLUDE fix + correct spec P-3 "只含col1-4"→"含col0/5整列", (3) delete HandleRespinGame orphan per §10.5 or document as approved exception with tracking, (4) R-3 auto-resolved with R-1 same line. Report documents誠實邊界: R-1 worst-case depends on "component actually wired" (UUID grep suggests not attached to any scene node, two skeptics disagreed on whether this downgrades severity), but commit hygiene demands revert regardless of runtime triggering. Low findings include: multiplier reset commented (commit 81f1f76 orthogonal WIP), m_isRespinGame not cleared in ResetPlateCursor (pre-existing lifecycle gap), ForEndToNext IsRespinGame branch unreachable (v2 known tradeoff), MULTIPLIER_EVENT disabled leaving dead branches (separate tracked work), proto package bump未審查 supply chain (procedural not evidence of exploit). Review validated real server structure: 14 RoundInfo with variable PlateQueue lengths 1-4, total 37 plates exercising all dual-index edge cases, confirming V-2 protocol commitment to multi-plate architecture and validating all design assumptions in P1-design-spec.md.</narrative>

pendingData 直接覆蓋 server 回包（`info = pendingData`）再丟給 `OnRecvSpinAck`。等於玩家可在 client 偽造任意盤面 / RoundQueue / PlateQueue（含 Respin/FG/贏分）。Ctrl+Alt+D 另可外洩原始 spin 封包。\\n- **風險定性**：最終結算 server-authoritative，∴ 實質為「client 端展示偽造 + 原始封包外洩」，非直接金流竊取。但對博弈產品仍是完整性/授權缺口（截圖申訴、社交工程），且此改動混在本次 working tree、**極易誤隨 P1 一起 commit/上線**。\\n- **修正**：\\n  1. 還原 `m_enableDebugTools=false`（最低要求）；或\\n  2. 改成編譯期 build-define 閘門：`import { DEBUG } from 'cc/env'`，`IsDebugEnvironment()` 回傳 `DEBUG && !sys.isNative && ...`，讓 release build 真正 strip；\\n  3. 若本機臨時測試需 true，務必從暫存區排除此行，並補 lint/pre-commit 防止 `m_enableDebugTools=true` 被提交。\\n- **skeptic 結論**：isReal=true，confidence 0.9（扣 0.1 給「是否真上線」之環境前提，屬無法從碼證實的 B 級）。\\n\\n> 註：另有一筆獨立評估同一行的 medium finding，skeptic 把實際 blast radius 評為更低（component 未 wired 至任何 scene + native gated，onLoad 不會執行），認為 severity 應為 low。兩份 verdict 在「未追蹤旗標翻轉不應隨重構進 commit」這點一致；嚴重度分歧見下方「嚴重度註記」。**保守起見以 high 列為必修的 commit-gate（還原或排除此行），實際漏洞觸發前提取決於該 component 是否被掛載。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## (2) Medium `P1-design-spec.md §3.1 P-3`（:82 / :233）/ `EnterRespinState.ts:84-122`\\n- **問題**：規格 P-3 假設 `RespinLockedPos` 只含 col1-4，但真實回包逐筆解碼證實 col0/5 也在內（Round0 sub0=[0,1,2,3,...,20,21,22,23]，其中 並對全集合重建靜態圖；col0/5 既由 `SetColumnLock` 整列鎖定、又被 EffectPlate 疊靜態張 → 視覺上雙重鎖定 / 可能蓋圖錯亂。\\n- **關係**：這正是未 commit 的 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC=true` 要修的問題。該開關方向正確（只跳過 col0/5 的靜態張重建、不過濾 merge），且 `expected 聯集` 與 `actual merge` 兩邊都含 col0/5 故斷言仍一致。但修正停在 working tree 未提交。\\n- **修正**：\\n  1. 盡快提交 `EXCLUDE_LOCK_COLUMNS_FROM_STATIC` 修正；\\n  2. 更正 spec §3.1 P-3「只含 col1-4」為「含 col0/5   <narrative>Primary Claude Code session performed grep-based validation of P3-review.md critical findings, confirming accuracy of memory agent's documented issues. R-4 orphan status definitively validated: comprehensive grep across assets/Script/**/*.ts for "HandleRespinGame" yields only 6 total matches splitting into 2 distinct entities—(1) AwardState.ts lines 41/77 showing HandleRespinGameAward method (different signature, handles Respin award display logic, NOT the orphan under review), and (2) UnshowPrepareState.ts showing orphan method definition at line 247 (private HandleRespinGame starting with log statement) plus 2 comment-only references at lines 102-103 documenting deletion rationale "原 if(IsRespinGame) HandleRespinGame()：unshow 不再以 Respin 身分恢復（改 plate 0 重播），此處不再呼叫；HandleRespinGame 方法暫留供 BC-8 實測接線（見方法註解）". Zero invocation sites found—no `HandleRespinGame()` call syntax exists outside these 4 lines (2 comments + 1 definition + 1 log inside body), proving method genuinely orphaned by f2f739e commit deleting唯一呼叫點. BC-8 preservation rationale confirmed present at line 244 as JSDoc comment "⚠️ BC-8 待實測：unshow Respin 恢復暫改「從 plate 0 重播整局」由 ENTER_RESPIN 重建鎖定，此方法目前無呼叫者。待 Respin 上線後確認 unshow 是否需在 prepare 階段直接鎖列亮燈，屆時恢復呼叫或刪除", documenting author awareness of orphan status and intentional preservation pending BC-8 unshow testing—but P3-review correctly identified this as violating CLAUDE.md §10.5 "your change caused orphan→delete" policy and contradicting binding spec P1-design-spec.md §5.7:253 user-confirmed deletion instruction. R-1 component wiring verification equally definitive: grep searching assets/ directory (recursive, all .scene/.prefab files) for "DebugToolManager" string produced empty result set after header output, confirming component class name appears in zero scene/prefab files. Combined with earlier grep showing UUID acb4b085-5e40-4653-9e4f-6424678e666e only in DebugToolManager.ts.meta (not in any .scene/.prefab/.fire), proves component never attached to any node in scene hierarchy. This validates P3-review.md R-3 skeptic caveat noting "Component（uuid acb4b085-…）在 Edit.scene/MainGame.scene 皆 grep 不到、repo 無 .fire、無動態 addComponent，未掛在任何 node → onLoad 不執行 → 即使 flag=true 除錯工具實際不會啟用"—component exists in codebase but orphaned at instantiation level, meaning m_enableDebugTools=true toggle in working tree has zero runtime effect (RegisterKeyboardEvents never called, event listeners never registered, Ctrl+Alt+U functionality dormant). However P3-review correctly maintains R-1 as HIGH commit-gate finding despite non-wiring: (1) uncommitted flag flip shouldn't mix into Respin refactor commit regardless of runtime impact (commit hygiene), (2) component could be wired in future making latent toggle dangerous, (3) demonstrates absence of build-time DEBUG guard making toggle runtime-only protection.
